US_09_02_WATER_TOWER_CONTRACT_02_REW: Another source, wow! Let's teach that fire a lesson!
US_09_02_WATER_DELIVERY_WAREHOUSE_CONTRA: Putting Out The Fire At The Storage 2
Another couple of storage facilities near the factory have practically burned down and are still a fire hazard. We need to put the fires out.
Fine, another hazard curbed. Too bad, it's practically all burned. But if you wish, you can sort out what's left and use it however you see fit.
US_09_02_WATER_DELIVERY_FACTORY_CONTRACT: Putting Out The Fire At The Factory
Indeed, the most dangerous spot, practically all burned, nothing left. Let's try saving the infrastructure and whatever else can be saved. I can only wish good luck to all of us.
Whew! However hard and dangerous it was, you did it. And, as always, you did it in style! Thank you from all of us at the department!
US_09_02_SEISMO_SCOUT_CONTRACT_DESC: We've never quite established the cause of the fires, but one of the sources might have been located underground. We have to inspect the area and check this out. You could use a thumper to help you with that.
US_09_02_SEISMO_SCOUT_CONTRACT_REW: This is both good and bad news. Anyway, we should get down to work and resolve this problem.
US_09_02_SEISMO_WATER_DELIVERY_CONTRACT_: Now that we established the causes and exact coordinates, we need to put out those underground fires. The liquid sand mixture should help. This is extremely dangerous, but we're counting on you!
Unbelievable! You nailed it! My people watched you with eyes wide open, they should learn from a pro like yourself!
US_09_02_UNCLEAR_GOLD_CONTRACT_DESC: We would usually send containers with soil, gold and other rock straight to the factory, but the fires spared very little of it. Our railway station is back to work, so we'd like you to deliver everything there.
US_09_02_UNCLEAR_GOLD_CONTRACT_REW: Worked great, while the plant is down, we'll have to ship the loot like this. And here's a reward for your trouble.
US_09_02_LUMBER_MILL_REPAIR_CONTRACT_DES: An accident at the sawmill rendered a whole production line useless, so we had to pause log processing. We need some materials delivered for the repairs, and after that, all types of planks and boards will be available.
US_09_02_LUMBER_MILL_REPAIR_CONTRACT_REW: Fantastic! You have no idea how backlogged we are on those planks. Now we'll rush to delivery, and this is for your service.
US_09_02_DISASSEMBLY_DRILL_CONTRACT_DESC: We were going to drill a quarry at this location, but the place just wasn't good enough. Worse yet, now we've got a sewer breach on our hands. I think we've messed up enough. Time to make amends with the locals.
US_09_02_DISASSEMBLY_DRILL_CONTRACT_REW: Well done, another piece of our puzzle salvaged. We've learned our lesson. Here's hoping we can coexist peacefully with the locals from now on.
US_09_02_WATER_TOWER_TASK_01_DESC: Here we are, almost in the heart of the fire. If you restore this tower, your fire-extinguishing job will be a tad easier. And we'll make it worth your while, too.
US_09_02_WATER_TOWER_TASK_01_REW: Good job! Our towers may be oversized, but they certainly get the job done! And this is for you, my friend.
US_09_02_WATER_TOWER_TASK_02_DESC: The final refuge! These are the closest points for tower restoration. Out there, it's just fires and scorched earth. Let's finish these water monsters already and flood the whole area!
US_09_02_WATER_TOWER_TASK_02_REW: Great, another one's up! And you deserve this reward.
US_09_02_WATER_TOWER_TASK_03_DESC: One more! A dangerous spot, but who wouldn't like a little risk? In fact, this is the last good spot, so we're determined to finish what we started. You with us?
US_09_02_WATER_TOWER_TASK_03_REW: Perfect! The more water goes through the pipes in the area, the better I sleep. And something goes to your bank account as well.
US_09_02_DON_SCOUT_TASK_DESC: Can you imagine? I was hurrying home with my family, so I decided to take a shortcut. Sadly, it got me stuck in the marsh. We left the car behind and walked home. Could you help us pull out our car?
US_09_02_DON_SCOUT_TASK_REW: Thanks a lot, you're our hero! If it hadn't been for you, I don't know how we would ever travel to town again!
US_09_02_QUARRY_LOST_CARGO_TASK_DESC: Recently, we deepened the quarry, but we miscalculated the support strength. And when the concrete reinforcement slabs were almost there, the truck carrying them flipped over on the road. Could you please deliver the cargo?
US_09_02_QUARRY_LOST_CARGO_TASK_REW: Wow, all delivered intact, you did a fantastic job!
US_09_02_TATRA_FARM_TASK_DESC: One of our vehicles got stuck in the flooded field and is unusable. With our sewage problems, we have no use for it anyway, but the neighboring ranch would be happy to take it. However, there is a condition.
US_09_02_TATRA_FARM_TASK_REW: It's like new, great job! Here is your reward.
US_09_02_LOGS_VEHICLE_TASK_DESC: We had this truck transporting the logs along a dangerous route. The driver lost control of it, and the truck slid off the road. If you tow it out, you can use it for your own goals.
US_09_02_LOGS_VEHICLE_TASK_REW: Great, now we can keep up our wood supply to the sawmill. Here, this is for your trouble.
US_09_02_VR_TASK_01_DESC: The recent accident and the flooding damaged our infrastructure pretty bad. We need materials to repair houses and hangars, could you help us deliver them? For a reward, of course.
US_09_02_VR_TASK_01_REW: The first steps are taken, we are back on track, thanks!
US_09_02_VR_TASK_02_DESC: After what happened, we ordered some spare parts to repair our machines, but the truck that was carrying them turned over. Could you please gather the cargo and bring it here?
US_09_02_VR_TASK_02_REW: Good job, now we can fix most of our machinery and start pumping the water away. Here is your reward.
US_09_02_VR_TASK_03_DESC: This is practically our only working vehicle, and we lent it to our friends from the gold mine, so they can evacuate people from the factory. They are done, so could you bring the vehicle back?
US_09_02_VR_TASK_03_REW: We're so glad you're helping us! We can't not return the favor, can we! This car might be old, but it's a sturdy machine, so use it while you're helping our region through these hard times.
US_09_02_NEW_QUARRY_TASK_DESC: Our quarry is almost depleted, we'd like to explore the nearby area and choose what's best. A thumper will be very helpful.
US_09_02_NEW_QUARRY_TASK_REW: That means there's still a lot of gold here, it's great news! However, because of the recent tragedy, it's hard to say when we'll get back to this issue. Anyway, thank you, here's your reward.
US_09_02_METALLDETECTING_TASK_DESC: As you see, we evacuated successfully. Obviously, it wasn't that easy. The main trouble is that practically everything is buried under a thick layer of ash. You could use a metal detector to find something important, will you help us?
US_09_02_METALLDETECTING_TASK_REW: You have no idea how valuable that container was, and it's even intact! Great job!
US_09_02_FORGOTTEN_TRAILER_DELIVERY_TASK: Imagine, I moved here just recently, and the lads who've been helping me move my stuff took the wrong road and left my trailer somewhere out there. Could you bring it back to me? For a fee, of course.
What would I do without you? Thanks for your help. Here, you totally deserve it!
US_09_02_RENEGADE_SCOUT_DELIVERY_TASK_DE: Someone was so anxious to get away from the fires that he just took my car. He didn't get far, though. Could you please bring it back to me?
US_09_02_RENEGADE_SCOUT_DELIVERY_TASK_RE: It's good you were around to answer my plea. If it wasn't for you, who would've helped me? I guess I need to build a garage now...
US_09_02_CRASH_TASK_DESC: At the height of the fires, a local resident and a truck driver were unable to share the road, which caused both to fly off the road. The cars were abandoned at the scene. It is necessary to deliver them to the owners, as well as to repair them.
US_09_02_CRASH_TASK_REW: It was not easy at all, but you did it, take it, you rightfully deserve it!
US_09_02_MOUNTAIN_TOURISM_CONTEST_DESC: Hi, friend! We have a real challenge for you! Tourists adore the local fauna and arrange a real adrenaline ride here. Do you want to ride at speed and assess the condition of this route?
US_09_02_MOUNTAIN_TOURISM_CONTEST_REW: Impressive! You're a real psycho, in a good way, although I'm not sure...
US_10_01_DELIVERY_FERRY_DESC: The ferry at Duncan Bay is doing an important job safely taking vehicles across the river. It needs consumables for maintenance. Take this job, and we'll be grateful.
US_10_01_DELIVERY_FERRY_REW: Great! Now the ferry will smoothly deliver any vehicles!
US_10_01_DELIVERY_TRAILER_01_OBJ_DESC: Supplies are scarce in Duncan Bay now. People need any help they can get. Deliver the humanitarian supplies to the hunter's house and to the observation deck on the west coast.
US_10_01_DELIVERY_TRAILER_01_OBJ_REW: Local residents are grateful! And we generously pay for your community service.
US_10_01_ELECTRIC_POLE_01_DESC: Not only was the road ruined by the flood - the power line was damaged as well. We need materials for the repair. Deliver all the supplies they need, and you'll be helping us a lot!
US_10_01_ELECTRIC_POLE_01_REW: Thanks! Soon, repairs will start, and the supply of power will be uninterrupted!
US_10_01_ELECTRIC_POLE_02_DESC: You did a great job on your previous repair contract. Now, you have to finish what's left to do with the posts. The repair brigade will pay you back!
US_10_01_ELECTRIC_POLE_02_REW: Great! Now both coasts have uninterrupted power supply.
US_10_01_CONSTRUCTION_RAILWAY_DESC: Our railway station needs a warehouse for storage. It won't only benefit our company but also expand the range of delivered cargo. Will you take this job?
US_10_01_CONSTRUCTION_RAILWAY_REW: Good! Now, Duncan Bay's residents can get everything they need. The railroad connection will be reestablished!
US_10_01_CONSTRUCTION_FACTORY_OBJ: The Unfinished Business At The Plant
US_10_01_CONSTRUCTION_FACTORY_DESC: We have unfinished business - the plant construction. Help us complete this important task, and you'll be paid generously.
US_10_01_CONSTRUCTION_FACTORY_REW: Fantastic job! Now, we're ready to dispatch the resources necessary to restore this region.
US_10_01_DELIVERY_LOG_01_DESC: Several employees were hastily evacuated. We will gladly accept any help! Can you deliver some logs to our sawmill? For pay, of course.
US_10_01_DELIVERY_LOG_01_REW: That wasn't hard! But we are glad to have any kind of help.
US_10_01_DELIVERY_LOG_02_DESC: Another job for you that's easy but vital! Please deliver some wooden planks to the town, and we will pay for the delivery.
US_10_01_DELIVERY_LOG_02_REW: Great job! See, it's not that hard!
US_10_01_CONSTRUCTION_TWO_WAREHOUSE_DESC: We have a sawmill, but it's got no service facilities for our iron monsters. Please, help us build two service buildings. We need cargo for construction. Will you take this contract?
US_10_01_CONSTRUCTION_TWO_WAREHOUSE_REW: I know this was difficult. But you did it!
US_10_01_CONSTRUCTION_LOCAL_BUSINESS_DES: There is an outstanding contract up in town. Help a local business owner complete some construction. He will make it worth your while!
US_10_01_CONSTRUCTION_LOCAL_BUSINESS_REW: Thriving business means a thriving economy. You did an important job.
US_10_01_CONSTRUCTION_WAREHOUSE_02_DESC: As long as Duncan Bay hosts a meeting for the best, it would be great if they help with the town warehouse construction. This contract is a win-win. Show us what you can do!
US_10_01_CONSTRUCTION_WAREHOUSE_02_REW: When the pros are at work, it always shows! This is what I call a job well done!
US_10_01_EXIT_CLEANING_DESC: This task is a top priority for the region. The residents are cut off from each other because of the roadblock. It is crucial that we reestablish the connection ASAP. The administration will reward you!
US_10_01_EXIT_CLEANING_REW: Finally! The land route is restored. This is vital for Duncan Bay.
US_10_01_CONSTRUCTION_DRILLING_STATION_0: When it rains, it pours. We're aware of the accident at the oil rig. First of all, we need a construction platform and then materials to build new reservoirs.
First steps toward restoration! Thanks for the cooperation.
You helped repair the reservoir, now we need to resume construction. Deliver the materials to the pumping station, and you'll be paid well!
Great! Soon the pumping station will be ready to operate.
Keep up the great work! Your next contract is the service station construction. Bad weather will not ruin our plans!
You helped us build the Service Station, now we need the main thing, the Drilling Station.
Great! Construction is almost complete, all thanks to you!
US_10_01_DELIVERY_TRUCK_DESC: Please help me with my truck. I went off the road, and my engine died in the middle of the marsh. The truck must be delivered to the service center. I will make it worth your while.
US_10_01_DELIVERY_TRUCK_REW: Great! We'll fix the vehicle ourselves. Here's your reward.
US_10_01_FIX_BRIDGE_01_DESC: We'd like to build a new bridge to replace the old one. We'll pay for materials delivery.
US_10_01_FIX_BRIDGE_01_REW: Now you can ride across the bridge too. This will probably make your further work easier. The reward is being transferred to your account this very minute.
US_10_01_FIX_BRIDGE_02_DESC: One of the ferries could barely fit in these cracks, and it managed to crash its roof against the bridge. We've estimated the damage, and it needs repairing. We will pay for your work.
US_10_01_FIX_BRIDGE_02_REW: Now, getting to town will be so much easier. Great job!
US_10_01_FIX_BRIDGE_03_DESC: The flooding left no chance of survival for this wooden bridge. Please help us rebuild it.
US_10_01_FIX_BRIDGE_03_REW: The job wasn't easy, but you did it fine.
US_10_01_FIX_BRIDGE_04_DESC: The paved road has been washed away. The road workers obviously neglected their jobs! We have no time for construction. We need a wooden bridge as a temporary detour.
US_10_01_FIX_BRIDGE_04_REW: Wow! Truly a job done by a pro! Check your balance, we hope you'll be pleasantly surprised.
US_10_01_FIX_BRIDGE_05_DESC: The old bridge has been washed off to the ground. We need a new bridge, and it will be longer, too. If you deliver some logs for us, we will pay for that.
US_10_01_FIX_BRIDGE_05_REW: Look at that! Now, it'll be easier to get to the sawmill.
US_10_01_FALLEN_POWER_LINE_01_DESC: We have an unusual job for you. Some materials have to be delivered to the top of the Power Line Post using a crane. We need to finish repairing it. This contract offers handsome pay.
US_10_01_FALLEN_POWER_LINE_01_REW: Just what we needed! Now, we're closer to restoring the whole grid.
US_10_01_FALLEN_POWER_LINE_02_DESC: If you have a crane and could deliver the necessary parts to the top of the post, that would be awesome. Could you do that? We'll pay for everything.
US_10_01_FALLEN_POWER_LINE_02_REW: Duncan Bay will not forget you! This is for your trouble!
US_10_01_DELIVERY_TRANSFORMER_DESC: Power supply in the city gets interrupted all the time, we need a backup generator. Bring it to us, and we will reward you handsomely!
US_10_01_DELIVERY_TRANSFORMER_REW: That makes a lot of sense. I am happy to be working with you!
US_10_01_DELIVERY_METEO_DESC: We have a special request for you, container delivery. It holds lots of iron for our weather station. Bring us the container, and we'll pay you for delivery.
US_10_01_DELIVERY_METEO_REW: Great! The weather station is a significant part of rebuilding Duncan Bay.
US_10_01_DELIVERY_LIFT_DESC: We need to check the equipment of the ski lifts, but we are short on tools and resources. Please help us, and we'll pay.
US_10_01_DELIVERY_LIFT_REW: It wasn't that hard, but it sure was helpful! Now, we'll just wait for skiing season to start!
US_10_01_DELIVERY_HUNT_DESC: Living in the woods is tough. We need tools to repair the trailer, some odds and ends and some firewood.
US_10_01_DELIVERY_HUNT_REW: Living in the wild is tough. Thank you for bringing us some civilization.
US_10_01_FALLEN_TRAIN_DESC: Some carriages got derailed. We need to get the lost containers as soon as possible. For that, you'll need a crane. Deliver the containers to the railway station. We'll pay you for that!
US_10_01_FALLEN_TRAIN_REW: Don't you agree that was interesting! Here is your reward.
US_10_01_PASS_01_DESC: We'd barely repaired the road, and then a rockslide came! Clear it, and we'll reward you handsomely!
US_10_01_PASS_01_REW: Great job! Now anyone can travel here freely!
US_10_01_PASS_02_DESC: The rocks have been piling up here for quite some time. And, just recently, a truck bumped its trailer on the edge of the cliff, sending all those rocks sliding! Will you help us deal with this problem?
US_10_01_PASS_02_REW: You did a great job. This was an important part.
US_10_01_PIPELINE_01_DESC: The pipe literally burst, so the post didn't hold. Deliver the new pipe, and we'll be grateful.
US_10_01_PIPELINE_01_REW: Thanks for the delivery! Just what we need to complete the construction.
US_10_01_PIPELINE_02_DESC: The pipe replacement is in its final stages. The ones by the road are the last. Help us install them, and you'll get good money.
US_10_01_PIPELINE_02_REW: The order is complete, you get your hard-earned cash!
US_10_01_CONSTRUCTION_GAS_WAREHOUSE_TSK: Service Center For The Drilling Station
US_10_01_CONSTRUCTION_GAS_WAREHOUSE_DESC: In addition to the drilling station contracts, we also need to build a service center. Whether you help us or not, we'll pay for the delivery.
US_10_01_CONSTRUCTION_GAS_WAREHOUSE_REW: Great. You certainly did a big job here.
US_10_01_DELIVERY_OILTANK_01_DESC: Our truck left a fuel trailer on the road. The truck needs emergency repairs, and the trailer's just standing there. Get the trailer to our fueling station, and you'll get a financial reward!
US_10_01_DELIVERY_OILTANK_01_REW: Easy, wasn't it? That does it.
US_10_01_DELIVERY_OIL_RIGS_DESC: Oil! Our oil rigs need special care, they need spare parts! Deliver three parts and get paid.
US_10_01_DELIVERY_OIL_RIGS_REW: I suppose that was hard. Good thing you're done.
US_10_01_DELIVERY_OILTANK_02_DESC: Hey, we need some household fuel. Besides, we have a new truck we don't use much. If you deliver the fuel trailer and repair my monster, that truck's yours.
US_10_01_DELIVERY_OILTANK_02_REW: Great job! We have fuel, and the truck's working. It's yours. Let it serve you well, just like it served me.
US_10_01_CONTEST_RACE_DESC: In winter, this is a serene ski resort, and in summer the organizers set up a real test! Steep slopes, difficult terrain... so just brace yourself and show what you can do!
US_10_01_CONTEST_REW: You have completed an unusual race. Could you do better?
US_10_01_CONT_VISIT_DESC: The observatory need massive weather data, so give them our HDD as soon as possible!
US_10_01_CONT_VISIT_REW: The forecasts are in! Can you show better results next time?
US_10_02_DELIVERY_CARGO_01_DESC: Our Port is the only point where heavy cargo is delivered by water. Your task is to ship two containers from us to Duncan Bay. You will get good money!
US_10_02_DELIVERY_CARGO_01_REW: This job was complex but interesting. Here is the reward we promised.
US_10_02_GARAGE_CONSTRUCTION_DESC: Sadly, we're not done with garage construction. Accept this contract, and we will be. The garage will be your home away from home!
US_10_02_GARAGE_CONSTRUCTION_REW: Make yourself at home! Thanks for your cooperation.
US_10_02_CANNERY_CONSTRUCTION_OBJ: Uncle Fish Will Do This Job!
US_10_02_CANNERY_CONSTRUCTION_DESC: Our company is expanding. We're making the best canned fish! Plant construction is our top priority, so we'll pay well for cooperation. Are you on board?
US_10_02_CANNERY_CONSTRUCTION_REW: Great! Now, North Peak will get even more active, and there will be even more jobs!
US_10_02_DELIVERY_OILTANK_02_DESC: The Wildlife Protection officers need help. Now, they vitally need fuel. Deliver the fuel trailer from the city to their place.
US_10_02_DELIVERY_OILTANK_02_REW: Thanks a lot! Now, they're ready to give you another job.
US_10_02_SCOUT_VISIT_02_DESC: Wildlife Protection officers discovered a poacher hiding spot. Help the officers with the investigation. Study the situation, cooperation is rewarded.
US_10_02_SCOUT_VISIT_02_REW: Well, well, well, they're all gone. But they left behind a lot of evidence. We have another job to do.
US_10_02_DELIVERY_CARGO_04_DESC: The poacher's boat is stuck, and its cargo has to be delivered to the police station. Use the crane to deliver the evidence.
US_10_02_DELIVERY_CARGO_04_REW: All in the name of the law! You've served North Peak well.
US_10_02_TELEPHONE_TOWER_DESC: The Communication Tower is out of order, it needs to be repaired. Bring the spare parts and materials needed for restoration to the repair crew.
US_10_02_TELEPHONE_TOWER_REW: Now, you can call your family. Thanks!
US_10_02_DELIVERY_TRUCK_01_DESC: Local fishers never got important cargo for their boats. The delivery trailer got stuck on the northwest road near the plant. Get it to the docks, and the fishers will pay you.
US_10_02_DELIVERY_TRUCK_01_REW: As agreed, here is your money.
US_10_02_DELIVERY_BOAT_01_DESC: We hear that you're the go-to person for any cargo deliveries. We've got a special contract for you - delivering a fishing boat. Are you game for this highly responsible task?
US_10_02_DELIVERY_BOAT_01_REW: Doesn't it look beautiful! Thank you for helping us send it afloat. Here is your reward.
US_10_02_DELIVERY_OILTANK_01_DESC: Our driver got stuck in the marshes with an oil tank. The road is too rough, this calls for a pro like yourself. Help us with the delivery, and we'll be even.
US_10_02_DELIVERY_OILTANK_01_REW: What would the community do without you! Now, the city can be supplied with fuel.
US_10_02_FIX_BRIDGE_01_DESC: The region is barely explored, and the old bridges date back to our fathers' time. The bridge has to be rebuilt. Are you up to it?
US_10_02_FIX_BRIDGE_01_REW: Now, this road is passable. Great job!
US_10_02_FIX_BRIDGE_02_DESC: The wooden bridge collapsed under the heavy trucks. Bridges collapse here quite frequently, so there are always a lot of jobs.
US_10_02_FIX_BRIDGE_02_REW: There we go. Now, the bridge is solid and will stay this way for a long time.
US_10_02_SCOUT_VISIT_01_DESC: Local geologists need a water probe from the two lakes in the North and South of North Peak Park. Paid by the piece!
US_10_02_SCOUT_VISIT_01_REW: The geologists kept their word. Thanks for the probes you supplied.
US_10_02_DELIVERY_TRUCK_01_TSK_DESC: We need to confiscate this truck. It belonged to poachers. Fix the truck and deliver it to the service center. You'll be paid on site.
US_10_02_DELIVERY_TRUCK_01_TSK_REW: Now, the truck will serve more people. Here's your delivery fee.
US_10_02_DELIVERY_TRAILER_01_DESC: Force majeure has interrupted construction plans. People are short on some basic supplies. We gathered all the necessary things in two trailers. Deliver them to the construction site.
US_10_02_DELIVERY_TRAILER_01_REW: Just what we needed! You are our savior!
US_10_02_FARM_TOWER_CONSTRUCTION_DESC: We have dismantled the old water tower and we want to build a new one. Help us with the materials, and we'll pay for the delivery.
US_10_02_FARM_TOWER_CONSTRUCTION_REW: You saved us! The local farmers will be happy to have clean water.
US_10_02_DELIVERY_TRAILER_02_DESC: We have collected some junk the poachers left behind. We need to get rid of this trailer. Have it recycled.
US_10_02_DELIVERY_TRAILER_02_REW: Now, nothing will get wasted. Here's your reward for recycling.
US_10_02_WAREHOUSE_01_CONSTRUCTION_DESC: As a business owner, I see that this city lacks a service center. Help me with construction. I have listed the materials I need. Will you help?
US_10_02_WAREHOUSE_01_CONSTRUCTION_REW: That's what I call great work! Hopefully, business will turn a profit soon. Even though there's some paperwork to be done.
US_10_02_REMOVE_TOWER_01_DESC: Local residents need instruments to remove this fallen tower. They will disassemble it, and you will get part of the money. Do we have a deal?
US_10_02_REMOVE_TOWER_01_REW: We are done. Dismantled it for scrap. Here is your money.
US_10_02_DELIVERY_TRUCK_02_DESC: Hey, driver! I was heading for the plant but got stuck in those marshes. The truck is really good, too bad I'm a poor driver. Please help me, I'll owe you one.
US_10_02_DELIVERY_TRUCK_02_REW: You saved me! Here's your pay, just as agreed. I'll try to stay out of danger!
US_10_02_DELIVERY_TRUCK_03_DESC: Buddy, help me! My truck's stuck on this bad road. I need to have it pulled out and fixed. I'd be grateful for the help.
US_10_02_DELIVERY_TRUCK_03_REW: Superb! Now the truck is in good hands!
US_10_02_REMOVE_STONES_01_DESC: These rocks block the direct route. The locals will pay you handsomely if you help clear them.
US_10_02_REMOVE_STONES_01_REW: Way to go! No more detours through the marshes.
US_10_02_REMOVE_STONES_02_DESC: Geologists have warned us about the rockslide hazard here many times. Help us remove them, and people will thank you.
US_10_02_REMOVE_STONES_02_REW: Now, you can drive through here. Excellent job!
US_10_02_CONT_01_DESC: This terrain is tough. Local residents like to race their cars here to the top of the hill. The view there is spectacular!
US_10_02_CONT_01_REW: Interesting track, is it not? Try once more for best results.
US_10_02_CONT_02_DESC: Fish farmers have a weird tradition. They compete to see who will be the first to deliver some waste barrels. Join the local games and show what you can do!
US_10_02_CONT_02_REW: Not bad, not bad! Could you do better?
US_11_01_HOLIDAY_BEGINS_WITH_WORK_CONTRA: Your job is to deliver workers' cabins to the resort. You can pick them up at the factory. But first we need a generator to start manufacturing them. Time to get to work!
Great! Now we can begin construction.
US_11_01_CABIN_IN_THE_WOODS_CONTRACT_DES: We need to finish up a few tourist cabins before resort seasons gets going, but we've got a delivery issue. We need your help. Don't worry, we'll make it worth your while.
US_11_01_CABIN_IN_THE_WOODS_CONTRACT_REW: Great job! Our future guests will be thrilled.
US_11_01_CABIN_IN_THE_MOUNTAIN_CONTRACT_: We've got a couple of unfinished cabins for people who like to look down at the local landscapes. We need to deliver the materials so they can finish the cabins.
All right, looks like our issues with accommodations have been solved!
US_11_01_REQUIRED_TOOLS_CONTRACT: The Right Tools For The Job
US_11_01_REQUIRED_TOOLS_CONTRACT_DESC: Listen, we've got a little situation here... we left a trailer full of tools at the lower ski station. Could you go get them? We're kind of swamped over here.
US_11_01_REQUIRED_TOOLS_CONTRACT_REW: Awesome! Now we can get back to work.
US_11_01_CLEAR_MOUNTAIN_CONTRACT_DESC: Like with any other construction project, we've got a bunch of leftover junk. We probably shouldn't just leave it here. There's a recycling plant nearby. Could you lug all this stuff over there?
US_11_01_CLEAR_MOUNTAIN_CONTRACT_REW: Way to go! We'll recycle that junk using the latest methods. The local and the tourists will be thrilled!
US_11_01_FORESTER_IS_WATCHING_YOU_CONTRA: The forestry service is getting ready for tourist season, so we want to make the area is as safe and well-supervised as possible. The towers are almost ready, but we still need some more materials. Deliver them, and enjoy those beautiful views while you're at it.
See? We really appreciate your help. Nicely done!
US_11_01_TOP_VIEW_CONTRACT_DESC: A movie studio is shooting a new film nearby. We'd like to have a view of the surrounding area in case something happens and they need our help. Get the job done, and you'll have a front-row seat for the shoot!
US_11_01_TOP_VIEW_CONTRACT_REW: Great job! Now we can watch a legendary director at work!
US_11_01_FALLING_TOOLS_CONTRACT_DESC: We've got a problem: some essential supplies fell off a truck and landed right on the ice! We don't have the right gear to go back and get them. Do you think you can handle it?
US_11_01_FALLING_TOOLS_CONTRACT_REW: Amazing! How did we ever get by without you? Did you use to be a figure skater or something?
US_11_01_LOST_TRAILERS_CONTRACT_DESC: Spring came early this year, so the river overflowed and flooded the main roads. The workers couldn't get the trailers out, and we need them ASAP. Could you haul them the rest of the way here?
US_11_01_LOST_TRAILERS_CONTRACT_REW: There they are! We'll get plenty of years out of these things yet. Thanks for all your hard work. Here's your pay.
US_11_01_EQUIPMENT_SET_CITY_CONTRACT_DES: As you can see, we're shooting a movie here. The local countryside has some spectacular views, but, as I'm sure you understand, we still need extra set dressing in this business. Could you deliver all the supplies we need to build our sets?
US_11_01_EQUIPMENT_SET_CITY_CONTRACT_REW: We got some absolutely stunning shots! Have you ever thought about getting into acting?
US_11_01_EQUIPMENT_SET_MOUNTAIN_CONTRACT: No... no... this is all wrong. We need a real plane! Hey, could you give us a hand? I ordered the prop I need a long time ago, but it got stuck somewhere on the road. I need you to deliver it to me as soon as possible. I'm counting on you!
Wow, it's even bigger than I thought! Thanks a million!
US_11_01_HELP_FOR_DROWNING_CONTRACT_DESC: Spawning season is starting soon, and our fishermen's boats are broken. Help them! We need to make sure there's enough surströmming for everybody!
US_11_01_HELP_FOR_DROWNING_CONTRACT_REW: Thanks for all your help! Are you sure you don't want to raise a glass with us?
US_11_01_REPAIR_WAREHOUSE_CONTRACT_DESC: Could you repair the old warehouse? The roof caved in. It's not the end of the world, but we've still got some useful materials in there.
US_11_01_REPAIR_WAREHOUSE_CONTRACT_REW: It's nothing fancy, but it sure is handy, right? You're welcome to use the materials that are still good!
US_11_01_HOLLYWOOD_SMILE_CONTRACT_DESC: We've got big news! A famous actor is coming here soon to film a new picture. Do you know what that means? We need letters over our town, just like the Hollywood sign! Help us make it happen, okay? Do it for art!
US_11_01_HOLLYWOOD_SMILE_CONTRACT_REW: Isn't that something? We're gonna be a top-tier town now! Nice work. Thanks!
US_11_01_VIEW_FROM_ABOVE_CONTRACT_DESC: Alright, just one last big push, and all our construction projects will be done. All we have to do now is deliver a few cable cars, and then we can open the resort!
US_11_01_VIEW_FROM_ABOVE_CONTRACT_REW: Great! Thanks a lot for your help. This would have been a lot harder without you.
US_11_01_CITY_CONSTRUCTION_CONTRACT_DESC: The sets turned out to be bigger than we thought. We're going to need some extra equipment. We almost had it, too, but something went wrong in shipping. Could you help us out?
US_11_01_CITY_CONSTRUCTION_CONTRACT_REW: It's huge... but it'll make things go twice as fast. Thanks!
US_11_01_CABLE_CAR_CONTRACT_DESC: We need to finish work on the ski lift. Deliver the trailer containing the gear and materials we need, and then we'll settle up.
US_11_01_CABLE_CAR_CONTRACT_REW: We've taken our first steps toward ski season! Here's your payment.
US_11_01_FILM_STAR_CITY_CONTRACT_DESC: Our company wants to make sure every star who works with us feels right at home. We need you to deliver an expensive star trailer to the movie set, and we need it to get there in one piece.
US_11_01_FILM_STAR_CITY_CONTRACT_REW: Comfort comes first! Now we can start getting the set ready!
US_11_01_FILM_STAR_MOUNTAIN_CONTRACT_DES: As if the harsh weather weren't enough, you can't even get a signal around here! Deliver some communication equipment to the movie set with the plane.
US_11_01_FILM_STAR_MOUNTAIN_CONTRACT_REW: Now our crew can stay in touch! We can finally get back to filming.
US_11_01_TERRIORY_EXPLORATION_CONTRACT_D: I know that you are quite busy, but perhaps you could take up one more task? We would like to check those territories for contamination, but we don't have the technical means to do it. Can you help?
US_11_01_TERRIORY_EXPLORATION_CONTRACT_R: Nothing caught your eye? No campfires, no rubbish? Great news! Thank you!
US_11_01_STAR_TRAILER_MOUNTAIN_DESC: We're done filming in the city, so please drive our A-lister to the next movie set. The road might be a bit tricky, but I'm sure you can make it!
US_11_01_STAR_TRAILER_MOUNTAIN_REW: It wasn't the best of roads, eh? But I'm sure you can appreciate this view! Our movie is destined for success!
US_11_01_BRIDGE_REPAIR_TASK_DESC: The bridge is out, so we've been taking detours around it. Help us fix it — we'll make it worth your while.
US_11_01_BRIDGE_REPAIR_TASK_REW: It's wonderful to see our infrastructure being repaired like this! We owe you one.
US_11_01_FALLEN_CAR_TASK_DESC: My vehicle is stuck! Can you help me pull it out? I need it delivered to the movie set on the double! We'll settle up when you get there.
US_11_01_FALLEN_CAR_TASK_REW: Just don't tell my boss, okay? This is my first job as a stunt driver!
US_11_01_FAILED_MOVE_TASK_DESC: Hey you, the pro driver! I've heard about your skills. Mine aren't looking so hot — my favorite trailer got stuck in the mud. Help me pull it out, okay?
US_11_01_FAILED_MOVE_TASK_REW: Thanks, bud! Now I can have an awesome season even if the weather isn't up to snuff.
US_11_01_CORNERED_TASK_DESC: I somehow managed to get lost in the swamp in the middle of the night. The country there was so rough, I had to leave my trailer. Please help me pull it out.
US_11_01_CORNERED_TASK_REW: You`ve really saved my bacon! Thank you so much!
US_11_01_MISTAKES_HAPPEN_TASK_DESC: What rotten luck! I had to leave my trailer on the ridge. I'd really appreciate it if you could deliver it to us. I'll pay you, of course.
US_11_01_MISTAKES_HAPPEN_TASK_REW: You've done a lot of good, you know that? This trailer is all yours.
US_11_01_DROWNED_ORDER_TASK_DESC: We've got an urgent job, but the cargo we need to deliver is stuck by the shore. Could you please get all three loads and deliver them for us?
US_11_01_DROWNED_ORDER_TASK_REW: Thanks to you, we won't have to give up on this job! You're the best!
US_11_01_STRUCK_NOT_BROKEN_TASK_DESC: Here's the thing, I figured I'd give my beauty a little challenge and drove her down the route across the river. The engine died, but that's nothing. My poor car was swept away, and you're the only one who can help me pull it back out. I promise, I'll return the favor.
US_11_01_STRUCK_NOT_BROKEN_TASK_REW: My car's back, and you did a fine job repairing her! She's as good as new! Much obliged!
US_11_01_WRONG_TURN_TASK_DESC: I'd rather not tell you how my vehicle got stuck in the swamp, and I DEFINITELY don't want to explain it to my wife. Drag it out of there for me, would you? I'll pay you.
US_11_01_WRONG_TURN_TASK_REW: My alibi fell through! But thanks for your help. What would I do without you?
US_11_01_BLOCKAGE_ON_THE_ROAD_01_TASK_DE: All those months of ignoring safety regulations while working in the mountains have finally caught up with me — the road is completely blocked by a rockslide. If you help me get those rocks out of there, I'll pay you handsomely.
US_11_01_BLOCKAGE_ON_THE_ROAD_01_TASK_RE: Incredible! We can finally get past those rocks now!
US_11_01_BLOCKAGE_ON_THE_ROAD_02_TASK_DE: We've got a problem area that always gets blocked every season. This time it's your job. But we'll pay you for your time!
US_11_01_RECHARGING_TASK_DESC: Aside from the odd storm, the weather around here is pretty calm. Unfortunately, our facility's power supply got hit this time. Help us deliver the trailer with our new generator so we can get the factory up and running again!
US_11_01_RECHARGING_TASK_REW: This trailer is all yours. Now you can help us manufacture essential construction materials.
US_11_01_LOST_CARGO_TASK_DESC: We`ve lost some essential equipment during shipping. The trailer is still by the river. Could you get it back for us?
US_11_01_LOST_CARGO_TASK_REW: Now the skiers will have everything they need!
US_11_01_LEFT_TASK_DESC: You'll never believe this, bud! My vehicle fell of a rocky ledge. Could you help me get it out of there?
US_11_01_LEFT_TASK_REW: Thank you so much for your help!
US_11_01_FAIL_TASK_DESC: Our driver dropped a couple of barrels by the cliff while moving on a difficult route. Help him find and recover them.
US_11_01_FAIL_TASK_REW: That was definitely a tough one. Here's your pay — you`ve earned it!
US_11_01_FRIENDLY_HELP_TASK_DESC: Hi there! You look like a nice guy who could do me a favor. Can you take this trailer and help my friend to fix his truck? I'd go myself, but I'm too busy delivering orders at the moment.
US_11_01_FRIENDLY_HELP_TASK_REW: Thanks a bunch! I know you are swamped with work too. I hope you make good use of this repair trailer!
US_11_01_TAMER_TROLLS_TASK_DESC: Hello! I took pictures of a troll! Then it chased me into a swamp, so I had to drop everything and run for my life. If you pull my vehicle out of the swamp, you can have it. All I need are the photos.
US_11_01_TAMER_TROLLS_TASK_REW: Here are my photos! I will prove that I am not crazy!
US_11_01_FLOODED_RACE_CONTEST_DESC: Welcome to our humble abode! It's our tradition to host annual springtime races for the local fishermen. The flood washed out the roads this year, but that's what makes it even more fun! Wanna join us?
US_11_01_FLOODED_RACE_CONTEST_REW: Whoa, that was fast! Have some mercy on your car, won't you? Here's your prize!
US_11_02_WATCHTOWER_CONTRACT_01_DESC: If we're going to supervise the area, we'll need to build a watchtower. Deliver the materials, and you'll get your reward.
US_11_02_WATCHTOWER_CONTRACT_01_REW: Perfect! Now we have a great view of the lake and its surroundings.
US_11_02_WATCHTOWER_CONTRACT_02_DESC: We have to complete construction of the watchtower to secure our control over the West. It's critical that you help us here. Will you?
US_11_02_WATCHTOWER_CONTRACT_02_REW: Now we have a good view of the river so we can keep the local fauna safe! Great job.
US_11_02_RAIL_REPAIR_CONTRACT_DESC: There has been an unfortunate railroad accident, and this area has been struggling with logistics issues ever since. Two damaged rail pieces require replacement. Please deliver and install them where they're needed.
US_11_02_RAIL_REPAIR_CONTRACT_REW: Now, the station should be able to handle any incoming trains! Great job! The film studio will be happy that work can resume.
US_11_02_RECYCLING_RECOVERY_CONTRACT_01_: As you may know, we're really enthusiastic about waste, or rather its recycling. On that note, the local recycling plant needs some upgrades. Deliver the gear they need to eliminate pollution!
The plant is working again, waste recycling is underway, and we are protecting the environment all while producing some extra energy. Way to go! Here's your reward.
US_11_02_RECYCLING_RECOVERY_CONTRACT_02_: Seeing that the recycling plant is working again, it's up to us to deliver waste for recycling. Naturally, we're going to need a delivery driver, so we were thinking of signing with you again. The pay will be good!
Excellent! I'm sure the region will appreciate a cleaner environment. Thank you, and here's your pay!
US_11_02_HOTEL_HOUSE_CONTRACT_DESC: We're doing our best to provide great customer service. Tourist cabins are in need of renovation, so we're going to need some construction materials. Deliver some, and we'll be sure to compensate you for your efforts.
US_11_02_HOTEL_HOUSE_CONTRACT_REW: The exterior design is nothing short of striking, and the interior is beyond all praise! The tourists will be amazed! I'm sure the exact amount of your compensation will be a pleasant surprise.
US_11_02_MOVIE_PLACE_CONTRACT_01_DESC: We're finally resuming shooting in the new location. In order to get the set ready and start filming, we're going to require some materials and props in containers. Please deliver them to the movie set, and expect a generous compensation.
US_11_02_MOVIE_PLACE_01_CONTRACT_REW: Aaand that's a wrap! Amazing job, looks like we've got all the footage we needed in these locations. And, honestly, I have a really good feeling about it!
US_11_02_MOVIE_PLACE_CONTRACT_02_DESC: Our movie's no "Titanic", but we still need all kinds of props and set dressing. Deliver all we might need to the last movie set. You can expect to be compensated accordingly, and we'll even put your name in the credits!
US_11_02_MOVIE_PLACE_CONTRACT_02_REW: Thanks for your service! At first, I wasn't too sure you were the right person for the job, but now I see how wrong I was. Your name will go down in film production history! We hope to work with you again!
US_11_02_RESEARCH_CONTRACT_DESC: We need to check out the northern mountain trail. It's a difficult and dangerous route, so you're the only one who can handle the job. Of course, you'll be compensated accordingly.
US_11_02_RESEARCH_CONTRACT_REW: The route was more challenging than I'd thought, but you're an ace driver if I ever saw one. Thanks for being brave and skilled enough! Here's your reward.
US_11_02_FIXING_STATION_CONTRACT_DESC: The area is still littered with junk, mostly left by the construction workers. Collect the waste and deliver it to the recycling station. We'll be sure to pay you for the job.
US_11_02_FIXING_STATION_CONTRACT_REW: Here goes! Please accept this payment, as promised.
US_11_02_WATER_CAMP_CONTRACT_DESC: We replenish our water supply once every few weeks. The weather has been rough lately, and you're the only delivery driver we can trust. We're sure you'll live up to our expectations.
US_11_02_WATER_CAMP_CONTRACT_REW: Looks like both bases have been supplied with all they may need, which is great. We're ready to welcome visitors!
US_11_02_CAMP_CONTRACT_DESC: Winter may be over, but the nights are still freezing! We need some firewood to keep the cabins warm. Could you help us deliver it?
US_11_02_CAMP_CONTRACT_REW: Nothing beats kicking back by the fireplace among friends, listening to firewood crackling and enjoying the view!
US_11_02_MOVIE_PLACE_CONTRACT_01_02_DESC: We sure are lucky Nordic movies are at the peak of popularity. That said, great expectations demand great quality! It's time to drive our A-lister to the next movie set.
US_11_02_MOVIE_PLACE_CONTRACT_01_02_REW: Do you like our movie set? It might not be fully ready yet, but we know we can count on you there!
US_11_02_MOVIE_PLACE_CONTRACT_02_02_DESC: All that's left is to film the final episode at the last movie set. The crew's ready and waiting for the star of the show. Please drive the VIP trailer to the movie set.
US_11_02_MOVIE_PLACE_CONTRACT_02_02_REW: Looks like we're done... Almost done.
US_11_02_TRACK_DELIVERY_TASK_01_DESC: Look, I'm in a bit of a tight spot right now, and I really need my car delivered here. Can you do that for me? I'll pay you for the trouble.
US_11_02_TRACK_DELIVERY_TASK_01_REW: There, it wasn't that hard, was it? Thank you!
US_11_02_TRACK_DELIVERY_TASK_02_DESC: We're in urgent need of some junk for filming. On top of that, our driver got stuck in the middle of nowhere and knocked over that trailer we really need. Bring it all here, and the reward is yours!
US_11_02_TRACK_DELIVERY_TASK_02_REW: Not everyone could have handled this job so well. Thank you!
US_11_02_VISIT_TASK_DESC: Aside from being the ultimate relaxation spots, lakes also serve as natural fresh water reservoirs. That's why we're doing our best to combat water contamination. We have our work cut out for us, so we're going to need some samples for analysis.
US_11_02_VISIT_TASK_REW: Now, we'll need to thoroughly examine the water samples. Let's hope the contamination rates are as low as possible.
US_11_02_LOST_CARGO_TASK_DESC: It's a mighty river, all right! I was unlucky enough to face its current while transporting the shipment. Please help me recover the lost cargo! I promise to make it up to you.
US_11_02_LOST_CARGO_TASK_REW: Water can be unpredictable indeed... Thank you for the help!
US_11_02_BRIDGE_TASK_DESC: The bridge collapsed, failing the test of time. It requires urgent repairs, so we'll need construction materials delivered. Please help us so traffic can resume in this area.
US_11_02_BRIDGE_TASK_REW: Quality materials, proper preparations, fine work... It all speaks volumes to how reliable you are. Here's your pay for delivery.
US_11_02_WOODEN_BRIDGE_TASK_DESC: This wooden bridge once served as passage for mountain climbers looking for the most challenging trails, eventually collapsed due to old age. Just deliver some wood, and the bridge will be as good as new.
US_11_02_WOODEN_BRIDGE_TASK_REW: There, it looks sturdy as bridges go. I hope this modest compensation will be enough.
US_11_02_ACCIDENT_TASK_DESC: A white fox darted across the road in front of me, and I lost control of my car! I'm just glad the poor critter is safe, and repairing the car won't be a problem. Please help me recover it first.
US_11_02_ACCIDENT_TASK_REW: Nice! I'm going to enjoy a few days off by the river while they repair my car. Here's a little something for your help.
US_11_02_PATH_TASK_01_DESC: The spring season brings its share of trouble. The passage is blocked, and we're going to need some tools to clear the rubble.
US_11_02_PATH_TASK_01_REW: We'll send the stones to paleontologists for research. Here's your pay.
US_11_02_PATH_TASK_02_DESC: If you'd like to drive down a decent road, help me clear the rubble first. I'll be generous with your pay.
US_11_02_PATH_TASK_02_REW: At least now we can keep our wheels dry. Good job.
US_11_02_SEARCH_TASK_DESC: Some tourists lost control of the car last night and left it on the tourist trail. We know the approximate location of the car. You just need to drive around and find it.
US_11_02_SEARCH_TASK_REW: Thanks for the help! At least no one got hurt. Here's your reward.
US_11_02_SEISMO_TASK_DESC: The mine in the northern part of the region is long since abandoned, but we just got our hands on fresh water samples with a curious anomaly. You can expect good pay for scanning the rocks around the mine.
US_11_02_SEISMO_TASK_REW: The data array has arrived. And by thunder, it does look promising!
US_11_02_REPAIR_TASK_DESC: As ironic as it is, the repair station needs to be repaired. Bring us the construction materials so we can get back to work.
US_11_02_REPAIR_TASK_REW: At last! Now that we're back to work, we can repair any gear you might need!
US_11_02_NEO_FALCON_TASK_DESC: Well, if it isn't our friend! See that car over there in the swamp? She's been stuck there forever. Many people tried and failed to salvage her, and if you manage to get her out, she's sure to serve you well.
US_11_02_NEO_FALCON_TASK_REW: Isn't she a beauty! She used to be my faithful companion, but I've already bought a new car. Here's hoping she will serve you well, as she served me once.
US_11_02_DESCENT_CONTEST_DESC: Hiya, friend! This is urgent. We were planning to film a ski resort ad, but our driver is out sick. Can you drive around real quick and get some footage of these gorgeous local views?
US_11_02_DESCENT_CONTEST_REW: Whoa there! Thank you! I hope the footage turned out well.
US_11_02_DELIVERY_DESC: Right, so we're really short-handed and there's this gold bullion due for delivery yesterday. Will you please deliver it as fast as you can?
US_11_02_DELIVERY_REW: Huh? You're already done? Good job!
US_12_01_RESTORATION_CROSSINGS_CONTRACT_: We used to have a ferry running between the two towns, but with the docks closed down for repairs, logistics have been disrupted. The sooner we fix those docks up, the sooner you'll have an easier way to cross over.
The Eastfield Docks are looking good! They might make for a nice tourist attraction, actually.
Same story here—the docks are undergoing maintenance, but I can see a boat on the other side. We should give her the opportunity to dock here too, don't you think?
Westfield, come in. Are you ready? The ferry has cast off and is slowly making her way here. That's your return ticket, delivery guy!
US_12_01_WEATHER_STATION_CONTRACT_01_DES: Splitting uranium atoms isn't the only way to power things—solar power is good for that too! We've been ask to deliver some solar panels to a bunch of weather towers. It's the 21st century. Who needs batteries, right?
US_12_01_WEATHER_STATION_CONTRACT_01_REW: Taking weather readings is all well and good, but we've stepped up our game and can now use the weather to our advantage.
US_12_01_WEATHER_STATION_CONTRACT_02_DES: As luck would have it, two of the weather towers are now down for the count. We need to get them the supplies they need for repairs right away. Looks like the guys have found something really exciting there!
US_12_01_WEATHER_STATION_CONTRACT_02_REW: The data is coming in, so the researchers can get back to work now. But what's this “exciting” thing they've discovered? This is the first I've heard of it...
US_12_01_BIG_BRIDGE_CONTRACT_DESC: We've got an emergency! Part of a bridge has broken down—we need to repair it ASAP! Some of the researchers are now stuck on that island—their only way out is swimming.
US_12_01_BIG_BRIDGE_CONTRACT_REW: Did those guys even notice they were cut off from the rest of the world? Science, I tell yal...
US_12_01_TELESCOPE_CONTRACT_DESC: There's been another addition to our region—radio telescopes. These astronomical tools aren't just for studying celestial objects; they can also help us assess our water EM radiation levels.
US_12_01_TELESCOPE_CONTRACT_REW: These things are HUGE! But what do they have to do with hydrology? I don't get it. It's too bad I don't have a knack for science...
US_12_01_SCIENTIFIC_MACHINE_CONTRACT_DES: We were driving around taking soil samples when a landslide suddenly wiped out one of the roads. We had to ditch the vehicle and run for our lives. The poor thing is still stuck there. Can you help us get it out?
US_12_01_SCIENTIFIC_MACHINE_CONTRACT_REW: There she is! What a beauty, right? Know what? You can have it. Yeah, you heard me. It'll come in handy on those other jobs we've got for you.
US_12_01_SCIENTIFIC_INTELLIGENCE_CONTRAC: What were we doing in an off-road vehicle, you ask? Looking for a spot for yet another weather tower, of course! But since landslides are a concern, we should check a seismic vibrator.
Now this place looks promising, and no rocks are raining from the sky either! We'll take it.
US_12_01_WATER_PROBE_CONTRACT_DESC: Finally, a one-of-a-kind job! We need to pick up some data buoys—they're the latest thing in marine research tech. They need to be dropped off at the specified aquatic locations.
US_12_01_WATER_PROBE_CONTRACT_REW: Yup, just like that. And that's the last of them! They won't get swept away, will they?
US_12_01_TRANSFORMER_CONTRACT_DESC: Now that the power plant is done, it's time to get the buildings in the area some juice. We should start by finishing the transformer substation. It's basically done—we're just missing materials for a couple of units.
US_12_01_TRANSFORMER_CONTRACT_REW: The transformer yard is up and running, and the power lines have been connected. The plant will be able to power some of the infrastructure once we work out the kinks.
US_12_01_SPECIAL_BRIDGE_CONTRACT_DESC: This hunk of junk broke on us. Can you believe it? We've got dozens of deliveries waiting at the port, and the easiest way to cross that wall of water just bit the dust! We need it fixed, stat.
US_12_01_SPECIAL_BRIDGE_CONTRACT_REW: You did it! Great job! Now let's get back to our actual jobs.
US_12_01_LOG_FOR_STORAGE_CONTRACT_DESC: We had to cut down some trees to clear the plot of land for the substation. Some of the logs went to the sawmill, but not all of them. We need to get the rest of them to the town warehouse for further processing.
US_12_01_LOG_FOR_STORAGE_CONTRACT_REW: That's a zero-waste approach right there! I gotta say, those logs caused us some real trouble. The guys at the sawmill are swamped, but the town really needed to fill the warehouse...
US_12_01_POWER_LINES_CONTRACT_01_DESC: We've got the transformer yard and the main power grid, but certain lines still need some work. First things first, let's get this factory connected to the grid.
US_12_01_POWER_LINES_CONTRACT_01_REW: We can ditch the generator now that we've got a stable power supply—which means we won't be needing fuel deliveries either.
US_12_01_POWER_LINES_CONTRACT_02_DESC: Next up, there's an electric transmission line we need to finish. As you can see, they're all spic-and-span here, so be careful when you deliver the metal beams, okay?
US_12_01_POWER_LINES_CONTRACT_02_REW: And that's another plant that no longer need an independent generator!
US_12_01_POWER_LINES_CONTRACT_03_DESC: Just one more ETL to go. We still need metal beams, and I hope you didn't park our trailer too far away...
US_12_01_POWER_LINES_CONTRACT_03_REW: Brilliant! All the industrial sites are connected directly to the power plant now. That's what I call evolution!
US_12_01_SCIENTIFIC_CONTINUED_TASK_DESC: That's right, we can't waste a good hill and NOT build something on top of it. This one's easy—just grab a radar trailer and bring it to the specified location.
US_12_01_SCIENTIFIC_CONTINUED_TASK_REW: Perfect placement! Thank you! What's that? You want the radar? We can talk about that later.
US_12_01_VALUE_TASK_01_DESC: The earthquakes in the area have left us a couple of nasty surprises on the road. Let's clear the rubble from the direct route to the factory, okay?
US_12_01_VALUE_TASK_01_REW: Thanks for dealing with the roadblock! This cuts down travel time between the city and the factory by a lot. Here, take this for your trouble.
US_12_01_VALUE_TASK_02_DESC: We've got another road blocked by a landslide. The usual method should work here—just deliver the supplies and leave the rest to us.
US_12_01_VALUE_TASK_02_REW: And, just like that, the way is clear! You deserve a good reward for a job well done.
US_12_01_WOODEN_BRIDGE_TASK_01_DESC: The part of the road leading to the weather tower up north is really rough. We'd like to build a bridge there for the sake of convenience—get us some wood, and we'll do the job.
US_12_01_WOODEN_BRIDGE_TASK_01_REW: You can drive just about anything through here now. Thanks for the help!
US_12_01_WOODEN_BRIDGE_TASK_02_DESC: We've got a logistics issue with the eastern weather tower, too. The solution is the same here—we need to build a wooden bridge!
US_12_01_WOODEN_BRIDGE_TASK_02_REW: It's sturdy. We should be good. Thanks, man!
US_12_01_CAR_SWAMP_TASK_DESC: Hey, man! My car died on me right when I was hauling a fully-stocked trailer. Could you tow it to the other shore for me? I'd be much obliged!
US_12_01_CAR_SWAMP_TASK_REW: Thanks for the rescue, friend. Here's your well-earned reward.
US_12_01_CAR_TRANSFORM_TASK_DESC: Hey friend, I need some help. We forgot a bunch of spare parts—could you get the trailer carrying them to the transformer yard on the other shore? It has the tools we really need, too.
US_12_01_CAR_TRANSFORM_TASK_REW: We can finally get to work now that we're all set. Thanks for the help!
US_12_01_SPARE_PARTS_TASK_DESC: I can't get a hold of my logistics guy for some reason, and there's a shipment of all kinds of car parts waiting for us at the port. Could I trouble you to do the job and get that shipment to me?
US_12_01_SPARE_PARTS_TASK_REW: Maybe you wouldn't mind working for me full-time? The pay isn't much, but it's stable income...
US_12_01_PRIVATE_ORDER_TASK_DESC: As you probably know, we're building a highway that's supposed to connect the two shores. We need some extra supplies and workers' cabins brought over to the other side. I heard you might be able to do the latter for us.
US_12_01_PRIVATE_ORDER_TASK_REW: Yup, everything's accounted for! Signed and sealed, boom! Uh, how much do I owe you, again?
US_12_01_LEFT_LOAD_TASK_DESC: So we dispatched an order to another factory, but the truck set out with an empty tank, somehow. Needless to say, it didn't get far before it ran out of gas on the highway. Can you get the goods to their destination?
US_12_01_LEFT_LOAD_TASK_REW: I know this is ridiculous, but it won't happen again. We'll make sure to fuel up our vehicles in the future. Please take this as a token of our appreciation.
US_12_01_TRIAL_DESC: Unfortunately, there's not much to clean on this route nowadays, and we aren't even sure if we even need to. With that in mind, what do you say to driving the route as fast as you can? Are you willing to accept the risks?
US_12_01_TRIAL_REW: A few times I thought that you were about to crash and that would be it, but you did it! Well, anyways, I have a couple more calls for you...
US_12_01_DELIVERY_DESC: One of our researchers left without this order. Please deliver it as quickly as you can. Hurrying won't be enough, you'll practically need to teleport!
US_12_01_DELIVERY_REW: Of course I was exaggerating when I said “teleport”, but you still took me literally! That was lightning fast!
US_12_02_STATOR_FOR_START_CONTRACT_DESC: The turbo generator stator is the heaviest piece of equipment at the power plant. They can't start the reactor without it, but the transportation requirements are really strict. Good luck out there—you're gonna need it.
US_12_02_STATOR_FOR_START_CONTRACT_REW: This thing is humongous, right? I'm honestly surprised you were able to get it here in one piece with the kinds of roads we have. Well, now that it's done, we can start the first unit.
US_12_02_PUMPS_DELIVERY_CONTRACT_DESC: The list of special deliveries for our power plant also includes multistage pumps—they're the last things we need to put our turbine hall into operation. Please be extra careful with them.
US_12_02_PUMPS_DELIVERY_CONTRACT_REW: The turbine hall will be operational in three, two, one... go! The unit is fully functional now. Would you like a tour?
US_12_02_START_WORK_CONTRACT: There's Prep, and Then There's Prep
US_12_02_START_WORK_CONTRACT_DESC: And that's our nuclear power plant, the crown jewel of the energy industry! Impressive, right? We're mostly done with construction—just a couple of urgent deliveries left to make. Let's start with something easy.
US_12_02_START_WORK_CONTRACT_REW: Hang on, let me double-check if you've got everything here. And... looks like you do! We have all the materials we need for the external work now, but then there's the equipment that goes inside...
US_12_02_WATER_FOR_THE_NEED_CONTRACT_DES: We usually have a rainy spell this time of the year, but this time, something's gone wrong. Why don't we have an irrigation system? Good question... but let's not go there, okay? Let's just deal with this for now.
US_12_02_WATER_FOR_THE_NEED_CONTRACT_REW: This should tide us over until it rains. You know, I gave it some thought, and you're right, it's high time we asked for funding for an autonomous irrigation system.
US_12_02_RESTORATION_OF_RAILWAY_CONTRACT: Railroad trouble is one of the reasons we're behind schedule with this building. One section has to be replaced, and another has a pile of rocks blocking the way. Things will speed up once you deal with these issues.
I can just about see the train with our gear heading this way! Let's take a quick break before I give you your next round of jobs. Good work!
US_12_02_RESOURCES_DELIVERY_CONTRACT_DES: We're doing a lot of work here, so testing our water seemed like a good idea. Our experts have set up camps in appropriate places, but now we need some additional supplies. That's where you come in.
US_12_02_RESOURCES_DELIVERY_CONTRACT_REW: Delivery confirmed! Our camps have everything they need now, and, more importantly, the scientists are happy. All that's left to do is take some samples, run tests, and wait for the remote lab to get back to us.
US_12_02_SAWMILL_REPAIR_CONTRACT_DESC: Unfortunately, we've been shut down by a malfunction at the sawmill. Wood is an essential construction material for the plant, its units, and other things. We need you to deliver the parts to the sawmill on the double.
US_12_02_SAWMILL_REPAIR_CONTRACT_REW: Ah, I never thought I'd miss the infernal screeching of chainsaws. You could hear it all the way over there, you say? I'm not surprised. Okay, enough chitchat—the wood for all those orders isn't gonna cut itself!
US_12_02_LARGE_DELIVERY_CONTRACT_DESC: While the sawmill was idle, our backlog got so bad, we almost went through our entire log supply. Another delivery isn't scheduled for a while yet, but you've got some free time on your hands, so I bet you can handle it.
US_12_02_LARGE_DELIVERY_CONTRACT_REW: A trucker always shows up right when they're needed, you say? Well, you sure saved the day this time—we were THIS close to running out of logs!
US_12_02_ENGINEERING_WORKS_CONTRACT_DESC: HELP! Our wind farm substation just croaked, along with a couple of turbines. We need to do some maintenance to get the farm running again. We're expecting some supplies and a trailer, but it's nowhere to be seen...
US_12_02_ENGINEERING_WORKS_CONTRACT_REW: Thar she blows! And the wind has picked up too! I mean, yeah, the power plant is about to outshine our little wind farm, but I gotta admit I'm a fan of old-school tech. Just don't go spreading that around, 'kay?
US_12_02_DELIVERY_TOOLS_CONTRACT_DESC: One of the hydrology field camps needs some extra supplies right away. Looks like a logistics error—the guys forgot some things they needed.
US_12_02_DELIVERY_TOOLS_CONTRACT_REW: I think that settles it. But sheesh, did they have to yell like that? It's not like it was our fault. Whatever... let's just hope they do the rest of their job perfectly.
US_12_02_FEMM_DELIVERY_CONTRACT_DESC: One of the workers building the highway got drunk and left a vehicle idling at the construction site. It ran out of gas, and no one's been able to move it since. I say we get it out of there—it just might come in handy.
US_12_02_FEMM_DELIVERY_CONTRACT_REW: Now that's what I call a spacious vehicle—it's just what the doctor ordered for our shipping ops. You can keep the keys. You're the off-road delivery guy, after all.
US_12_02_HELP_SUN_CONTRACT_DESC: We take to any kind of power source like ducks to water, but when it comes to protecting the environment, solar power is hands-down the best! We've got nearly all the panels in place—just one more shipment to go.
US_12_02_HELP_SUN_CONTRACT_REW: This is what farming in the 21st century looks like! Gorgeous, right? And they're eco-friendly, too! Who needs that nuclear power plant anyway?
US_12_02_ATOM_CONTRACT_DESC: The authorities thought we should capitalize on this place's reputation as the nuclear power hub of the future and build a monument in the town closest to the power station. Can we count on you to deliver the supplies?
US_12_02_ATOM_CONTRACT_REW: Wow, that looks impressive! Time to plan some guided tours here!
US_12_02_HELPING_NEIGHBORS_TASK_DESK: Like we said before, there's a huge backlog of wood orders. Some locals have been waiting forever—could you do us a favor and deliver a bunch of planks to these locations?
US_12_02_HELPING_NEIGHBORS_TASK_REW: More planks for the people, less backlog for us! Good job!
US_12_02_FALL_FROM_BRIDGE_TASK_DESC: I messed up when crossing a bridge so bad that my car got flipped on its side. I'm fine other than a couple of bruises, but the car... Anyway, I'd really appreciate it if you towed it back to me.
US_12_02_FALL_FROM_BRIDGE_TASK_REW: My baby is safe! People don't really value what they have until they lose it... But I'll be more careful, I promise! Especially crossing bridges.
US_12_02_BLOCK_ON_THE_ROAD_TASK_DESC: As you probably know, the whole region is tectonically active, so we've got roadblocks left, right, and center here. This one in particular has cut us off from the NPP construction site. We need that road clear, stat!
US_12_02_BLOCK_ON_THE_ROAD_TASK_REW: Ah, it's so nice when you can go wherever you want and no stupid rocks get underfoot! I hereby proclaim you the best rubble cleaner ever!
US_12_02_RESCUE_WORKSHOP_TASK_DESC: We need some tools and spare parts to keep everything running like a well-oiled machine. Could you help us out? We'll owe you one!
US_12_02_RESCUE_WORKSHOP_TASK_REW: Now we're talking! Let's pop that hood and see what the problem is.
US_12_02_BEST_FOR_NPP_TASK_DESC: We had to take a different route because of all the recent roadblocks, but we were NOT ready for it, and all the shipping containers ended up scattered. They're full of electronics for the power plant! Will you help us?
US_12_02_BEST_FOR_NPP_TASK_REW: Awesome! Well, some of the equipment did take a hit, but it's fine for the most part. We owe you!
US_12_02_NIGHT_ERROR_TASK_DESC: So, I decided to take my girlfriend out somewhere nice at night—got her flowers and all that jazz. But the car got stuck along the way! All my romantic plans fell through, and I had to ditch the car, too. Fetch it for me, will you?
US_12_02_NIGHT_ERROR_TASK_REW: Thanks for getting my car out, man! I'm never going there again. There are other exciting date destinations around...
US_12_02_DANGEROUS_BEND_TASK_DESC: Believe it or not, we almost made it to the power plant when our rig's rear wheels lost traction, the trailer ripped out of the coupling and sent the cargo flying into the river. We need everything back—can you do that?
US_12_02_DANGEROUS_BEND_TASK_REW: I know this is ridiculous. Dumb but funny. But, jokes aside, we need to get back to work. Thanks for your help.
US_12_02_REPAIR_TRAILER_TASK_DESC: So, my car broke down, and I called a local mechanic for help. He is... an interesting character, because he picked the most convoluted way to get to me and ended up stuck, naturally. Could you get his trailer out?
US_12_02_REPAIR_TRAILER_TASK_REW: I'd better give this to you since you ended up doing the mechanic's job. On second thought, you can have the trailer, too—just make sure its previous owner doesn't see...
US_12_02_BOILER_FOR_FARM_TASK_DESC: We've got a major order, and I think you should take it now that the trains are running again. Some fat cat needs a big new boiler for the ranch he's just bought and wants to remodel.
US_12_02_BOILER_FOR_FARM_TASK_REW: No idea what that guy's planning, but you did your job perfectly! Luckily, the client's not stingy.
US_12_02_FALLEN_HAY_TASK_DESC: We needed to move some hay between ranches, but, of course, the road we picked was trash, so some of the hay is still decorating the hills by the river. Could you gather it back up for us?
US_12_02_FALLEN_HAY_TASK_REW: The hay's a bit dirty, but that's okay—they can still use it if they get rid of the upper layer. Ah, lying in a hay stack with a cold bottle of beer feels nice, doesn't it?
US_12_02_STUCK_MUD_TASK_DESC: So, our wind turbines broke down, but when we tried to fix them using our own resources, my trailer with all the tools got stuck. Our help's not needed anymore, but I'd still like to get my trailer back, you know. Could you retrieve it?
US_12_02_STUCK_MUD_TASK_REW: Thanks, man, you're a lifesaver! I gotta admit, I don't know much about wind turbines. Now raising crops, that's a different story...
US_12_02_SAD_RIDE_TASK_DESC: Some guys from Tennessee organized a swamp race in these parts—kind of like a rally. But one of the contestants dropped out early, and his stalled car blocked a prizewinner. Let's get it out of the way, okay?
US_12_02_SAD_RIDE_TASK_REW: Thanks for your help! We can take it from here. By the way, you should totally join the race if you haven't already!
US_12_02_MUD_TRACK_CONTEST_DESC: That's right, we ARE those Tennessee guys! We decided to set us up a little swamp race to see who's the best driver 'round these parts. Lots of people have already signed up—it's gonna be great! So how about it? Wanna give it a try?
US_12_02_MUD_TRACK_CONTEST_REW: Wow, you made good time! What do you think about joining our little competition?
US_12_02_MOUNTAIN_RIDE_CONTEST_DESC: Psst, it's the Tennessee guys again! So we're holding another race, but there's a catch. We don't have the official go-ahead for this one! Are you ready to risk it all and zip along a crazy dangerous mountain track?
US_12_02_MOUNTAIN_RIDE_CONTEST_REW: You never cease to amaze! Where'd you learn to drive like that? Ever thought of going pro? We could sponsor you!
US_12_03_COOLING_TOWERS_01_DESC: Another important part of a nuclear plant is the cooling towers. They remove heat from the circulating water used in the plant. They're big in every sense of the word, so your cargo will be too. Think you can handle it?
US_12_03_COOLING_TOWERS_01_REW: That's one tower done. Just look at the size of that thing! I don't think I'll ever get used to it. And if you knew how long it took to build one...
US_12_03_COOLING_TOWERS_02_DESC: Time to get the second one up and running. Is this water radioactive, you ask? Not at all! The radioactive water heated by the core runs through a separate circuit, heating and vaporizing water in the other one. Got it?
US_12_03_COOLING_TOWERS_02_REW: Look at our two brand-new cooling towers! Some people think they're chimneys, but they're wrong...
US_12_03_CONSTRUCTION_GARAGE_02_DESC: Think about it. Small town—check! Big construction site—check! Old and new vehicles in need of maintenance—check! I could go on, but you get the point. We need the whole package for our garage!
US_12_03_CONSTRUCTION_GARAGE_02_REW: Check this out. We can now bring vehicles right to your doorstep and customize their appearance however you want. Isn't that nice?
US_12_03_CONSTRUCTION_GARAGE_01_DESC: In addition to the garage, we also need somewhere we can park our cars and provide all kinds of repair services. As you can see, construction is in full swing—we just need you to deliver some supplies...
US_12_03_CONSTRUCTION_GARAGE_01_REW: Great! You know where to find us if you ever need repairs or diagnostics for your ride.
US_12_03_TRAILER_SHOP_DESC: So you're saying the trailer parking lot needs to be right by the garage? That'd definitely be convenient, but this is a job from a corporate client, and as far as I know you'll be able to buy those trailers later on.
US_12_03_TRAILER_SHOP_REW: This should make our work at the power plant easier—and yours too, for that fact. You've been such a great help, it'd really make sense to give you the trailers for free, but you know how the corporate world works...
US_12_03_FARM_WATER_DESC: Didn't we have a conversation about dry “rainy” seasons before? I think you said something about irrigation systems... anyway, please fill those water tanks. The farmers are counting on you.
US_12_03_FARM_WATER_REW: Thanks for saving us. We're gonna get some sprinklers, I swear! Next year. Or maybe the year after. Or maybe...
US_12_03_CONSTRUCTION_BRIDGE_01_DESC: We've decided to revamp our cooling circuit a bit by adding a couple of bridges over the waterways. It's more of the usual—just bring us some metal and concrete to work with, and we'll get the job done.
US_12_03_CONSTRUCTION_BRIDGE_01_REW: It's neat and minimalist, and, more importantly, practical!
US_12_03_CONSTRUCTION_BRIDGE_02_DESC: We've got two waterways, which means we need two bridges. We could just drive around the whole thing, but why not make our lives easier if we've got the funds? Hey, did your eyes just turn into dollar signs for a second?
US_12_03_CONSTRUCTION_BRIDGE_02_REW: This makes getting around so much easier! Good job, man.
US_12_03_REPAIR_CRANE_DESC: As you might have heard, we had an incident at the port: it's flooded. No worries though, we've got a clean-up crew on it and we're still accepting shipments. The only real issue is one of the cranes...
US_12_03_REPAIR_CRANE_REW: We could've waited, but with all the construction going on in the area, time is of the essence, so we'll just have to keep going. That's logistics for you...
US_12_03_CONSTRUCTION_WATCHPOINT_01_DESC: The old watchtower on the island is a real relic of the past. But despite the fact that it could collapse at any moment, it's kind of a local landmark. We need to fix it up ASAP!
US_12_03_CONSTRUCTION_WATCHPOINT_01_REW: It'll be only fair if you climb it first. So, what's the view like up there?
US_12_03_REPAIR_DAM_DESC: We've got a problem. The dam is fine, but because of certain internal malfunctions, water is no longer being pumped into the tanks. This has to be fixed right away, since the guys in town need tons of water right now.
US_12_03_REPAIR_DAM_REW: That's much better. Both of the cranes are now in working order, and we shouldn't have any issues with water either.
US_12_03_BUNKER_ORDER_DESC: They're shutting down the nearby mine until all the power plant units are built. The workers were in such a hurry to go home, they forgot to clear the mines properly. We are talking a couple of containers of waste. You know where I'm going with this?
US_12_03_BUNKER_ORDER_REW: You must be getting tired of all the floods and construction projects. Still, the pick-up went well, so I think we should take a little something out of the miners' pay and give it to you instead, eh?
US_12_03_SEISMO_CHECK_DESC: Taking into account the large number of landslides and low-magnitude earthquakes, we'd like you to test some areas for seismic activity. It's especially important because of the mine and the people working in it.
US_12_03_SEISMO_CHECK_REW: Thanks, we've processed the data. It's too soon to make any big conclusions, but we definitely need to keep an eye on things.
US_12_03_WATER_HOUSE_01_DESC: Some people choose to build their homes really out of the way, and plumbing can pose a bit of an issue out there. Could you help us deliver some water to this location?
US_12_03_WATER_HOUSE_01_REW: I hope this will tide them over until we fix the problem with that part of the system.
US_12_03_WATER_HOUSE_02_DESC: We've got another remote residence cut off from the water supply. Please fill up your tank and hurry over there before they file a complaint! Yeah, I know, we messed up, but we'll compensate you for the trouble.
US_12_03_WATER_HOUSE_02_REW: Most of the pipes there are so old they've started disintegrating and need to be replaced ASAP. We'll work on that, but you should check your account in the meanwhile. The amount we agreed on should be there.
US_12_03_REPAIR_TOWER_01_DESC: Mayday, mayday! We've been having issues with operating electronics due to bad reception. Could you help us fix the comms tower?
US_12_03_REPAIR_TOWER_01_REW: Great, everything's connecting as it should now! You're so good with your hands... and towers!
US_12_03_TRAILER_01_DESC: We were coming back from a delivery when our vehicle got stuck in some mud. They were able to tow the car, but the semi-trailer is still hanging out there. Could you please get it back for us?
US_12_03_TRAILER_01_REW: Phew, we can finally get back to our deliveries! Your help has been invaluable. Here, this is for your trouble.
US_12_03_SCOUT_01_DESC: So there my family and I were, having a great time outdoors on our picnic, when I noticed my car rolling towards the cliff's edge. Somehow, it didn't fall, but it's hanging on by a thread. Can you get it out for me?
US_12_03_SCOUT_01_REW: You almost dropped it? Ah, who cares, as long as you did the job in the end! I've included a little something extra with your pay as a token of gratitude.
US_12_03_SCOUT_TRAILER_01_DESC: The local retreat ran out of some groceries—right when they had updated their menu and were receiving guests, too! We got the order, you understand, and now the packages need to be delivered.
US_12_03_SCOUT_TRAILER_01_REW: That was so fast I barely had any time to worry! Our chefs are already cooking up a storm—would you like to try our signature Smothered Cooling Towers?
US_12_03_ECO_ORDER_01_DESC: The issues at the port a while ago caused one of the ships to crash after being unable to dock properly. We've learned it was carrying some pretty valuable cargo—could you check if there's anything worth salvaging?
US_12_03_ECO_ORDER_01_REW: Wow, thanks! What's inside, you ask? Don't worry about it. As they say, curiosity killed the cat! Anyway, we owe you for the job, so don't forget to check your account.
US_12_03_FISHERS_01_DESC: I know this ain't no fishing festival, but we're still in need. Tools to repair this thing, more specifically. It shouldn't take long—will you do it?
US_12_03_FISHERS_01_REW: Good job! The repairs will have to wait, though. I decided I might as well go to an actual fishing festival now! They won't know what hit 'em. Wish me luck.
US_12_03_TRAILER_PARK_01_DESC: Believe it or not, some delinquents have siphoned all the gas from our cars! How the hell are we supposed to get around now?! The factory's management is willing to provide us with fuel, but we need you to get it here.
US_12_03_TRAILER_PARK_01_REW: Ah, good timing, we barely have any food left! Now we can finally go shopping. Your help is much appreciated, so here's a little something for the trouble!
US_12_03_TRAILER_ENERGY_DESC: The flood didn't just damage the loading docks—our power unit took a hit, too. We urgently need an independent power supply. Luckily, the closest logistics center has one available.
US_12_03_TRAILER_ENERGY_REW: Our rebuilding efforts are well underway—thanks to you, in no small part!
US_12_03_SCOUT_02_DESC: Hey! I was driving this little truck along the coast and got stuck. Well, I was the one who chose the road! Could you help me tow it out?
US_12_03_SCOUT_02_REW: You really did me a big favor! Still, the navigator was right, I will be more careful in the future...
US_12_03_TRUCK_01_DESC: I was always told I was a natural driver. So, I always drove on our roads without thinking about what I was doing, and now I've paid the price for my hubris. Could you please help me, poor driver?
US_12_03_TRUCK_01_REW: Phew, this time I got away with only a blow to my ego. Well, technically this makes two times. I hope the story of my mistake will not escape the walls of the factory.
US_12_03_SCOUT_TRAILER_02_DESC: Our old barn has been completely overgrown with weeds, and as to what happens inside, well, it's better not to know. That why it's time to clear away this rubbish. That's where you come in.
US_12_03_SCOUT_TRAILER_02_REW: I wish everyone had your work ethic, simply superb! I think we can agree on that much, right?
US_12_03_CONT_RACE_01_DESC: We know the condition of routes emanating from the asphalt road in excruciating detail, but we don't know the condition of this particular road. Can you give your professional opinion?
US_12_03_CONT_RACE_01_REW: This is very valuable information, we will take all the details into account. Thanks! Here is your payment, as promised.
US_12_03_CONT_RACE_02_DESC: Forest rangers are having difficulty reaching observation towers. We need to perform a quality assessment of the coastal roads. So, drive along this route with your knowledge and a timer.
US_12_03_CONT_RACE_02_REW: It turns out they were right, it's quite a difficult section. Still, we have obtained all the data and now we know what we need to do. Thanks!
US_12_04_RAILWAY_STATION_REPAIR_CONTRACT: Welcome to the most remote part of the region. Abandoned utility buildings and a couple of houses are the only signs of life left here. I think we should start by repairing the train station—for the sake of logistics.
Well, that's a start. We'll get our warehouse up and running soon enough, but before you can access it, we should see what state the railroad is in.
US_12_04_RAILWAY_REPAIR_CONTRACT_DESC: There are several places where the tracks are obstructed by rubble. You're probably sick of it at this point, but could you please help us out one more time? It's the last thing we need to get the trains running here.
