US_15_02_HIGHWAY_01_DESC: So, we're waiting for some supplies we need to build a bridge here. You'll be paid on delivery for transportation, as well as for your driving service. Present company shall not be liable for the damages sustained by the cargo during transport. Are you up for the job?
US_15_02_HIGHWAY_01_REW: Great job! All the goods are accounted for, which means that we'll be able to make ends meet and build some good roads in these picturesque parts. Everyone loves a scenic road, eh? Here's your pay!
US_15_02_HIGHWAY_02_DESC: Hey. We're on a tight deadline here, and we need a buttload of supplies to finish the bridge in time. Tricky part is getting to the construction site, but we hear you're an expert. Think you could handle this?
US_15_02_HIGHWAY_02_REW: Great job! We've made it in time, and the bridge is finally ready. Would've been another story entirely if you didn't get us those supplies. You really helped us out. If you ever drive over that bridge, just know it exists thanks to you.
US_15_02_PIPELINE_CONTRACT: On the Other Side of a Pipeline
US_15_02_PIPELINE_DESC: You never know what you're going to find in an old water main. There's some sort of mushroom growing on the sides, and we've found a live turtle in one of the branches! It's high time to replace that pipeline. Mind delivering a pipe for us?
US_15_02_PIPELINE_REW: That's a great pipe! The manufacturer assures us it has special inner and outer coatings to increase its service life. Here's hoping it'll last more than a year. Thanks for the help, and here's your pay!
US_15_02_TUNNEL_DESC: This is dispatch! We've had the outer rock layer collapse in the northern tunnel. No casualties. We need a drilling rig and a repair van to resume work. Do you copy?
US_15_02_TUNNEL_REW: Thanks for answering our emergency call, bud! In prospecting, every minute counts, so we value your efficiency and are willing to translate that appreciation into hard cash.
US_15_02_SUPPLY_PARAGLIDING_DESC: Hey there! I'm a paraglider and I love exploring the vast, open skies. But even I have to land sometimes, especially when I run out of fuel. Could you do me a solid—get me some fuel and spare parts? I'll make it worth your while!
US_15_02_SUPPLY_PARAGLIDING_REW: Great job! I'm finally free to follow the wind again. Thanks for the help, bud! May the roads you follow be smooth and your supply of fuel endless!
US_15_02_QUARRY_DELIVERY_DESC: The mining operation is in full swing, but the deeper we drill, the more spare parts we go through. We keep finding all sorts of holes in the bedrock. We'd appreciate it if you could get us some new supplies before the ones we have run out.
US_15_02_QUARRY_DELIVERY_REW: Good job! And it took less than an hour, too—that's impressive. Oh, it was more? Never mind, the passing of time feels different when you're underground. Well, thank you anyway, here's your pay!
US_15_02_SUPPLY_PARK_DESC: Our company has been hired to build several rentals, and the deadline is coming up. Most of them are ready, but we still need to finish two houses. Missing the deadline is not an option, because they've been booked in advance. Help us out, eh?
US_15_02_SUPPLY_PARK_REW: Okay, all the houses are built. Here's hoping that our first guests, Tony and Ezekiel, will enjoy their time on the opposite sides of the lake, and the peaceful atmosphere will help them relax!
US_15_02_WINTER_NEED_DESC: This season, our company has opened a new scenic overlook by the lake. It's a great tourist attraction, but we need to get ready for the influx. According to our estimates, we'll need more logs, spare parts, and fuel. Can you get all of that to us?
US_15_02_WINTER_NEED_REW: Beauty does have its price. In our case, it requires regular deliveries. But we're all set for now, so you're free to enjoy the view and the fresh deposit in your account.
US_15_02_FISH_FESTIVAL_DESC: Hey, buddy! We're absolutely swamped. There's so much work to be done with the Fishing Fest coming up. We need more planks and logs, like, yesterday, if we don't want our guests to sit on the ground. Help us out, eh? The festival's at stake here!
US_15_02_FISH_FESTIVAL_REW: They say you need luck to haul in a good catch, but what this festival needs are people like you. Thanks for the help! The festival is a-go, and I bet you'll have everyone's gratitude.
US_15_02_WASTE_RECYCLING_DESC: Mining always generates waste that needs to be properly disposed of, so we need to send all this trash for recycling before they slap us with a fine. Take it to the warehouse at the local port for us, eh?
US_15_02_WASTE_RECYCLING_REW: Great! We've managed to dispose of the waste in time. All according to the environment protection standards, which means that we don't have to worry about any fines. Like I always say, it's better to be safe than sorry! Anyway, here's your pay.
US_15_02_SUPPLY_LOG_CONTRACT: A Timberman's Work is Never Done
US_15_02_SUPPLY_LOG_DESC: Our camp has been working overtime lately. Everyone needs wood. That's why our equipment has been wearing out at a faster rate. We're in desperate need of spare parts. We need to keep this operation running!
US_15_02_SUPPLY_LOG_REW: I appreciate your efficiency, bud! Thanks to you, this camp should be able to complete all the orders on time. Our maintenance crew is already on the job. And here's your well-earned reward!
US_15_02_UNDER_ICE_DESC: According to the list of participants, three of the trailers are yet to arrive. Luckily, we were able to get in contact with their owners—turns out they need a bit of help getting here. Could you handle that for us?
US_15_02_UNDER_ICE_REW: Ah, the reasons people run late sure can be wild... but that's okay, as long as everyone makes it here safe and sound. Driving on ice is a special kind of art, eh?
US_15_02_PIPE_CASES_DESC: We've got a non-delivery of two giant pipes, and they're yet to be found. The pipes weren't secured properly during transport, so they fell off somewhere by the dam. All you need to do is follow the river and bring our cargo back.
US_15_02_PIPE_CASES_REW: You have a good nose for pipes, ace detective! Fishing them out of the river wasn't too much trouble, eh? Anyway, the outer layer took some damage when it hit the ice, but it's nothing that can't be fixed. Thanks for dredging up the payload!
US_15_02_HELP_TRUCK_01_DESC: Hey, bud! I wanted to capture the beauty of nature, so I took a canvas, an easel, and some paints—set out to find the best spot. Thing is, the road was so hammered that I lost control of my car, and now it's stuck in the middle of nowhere. Could you tow it back to my house?
US_15_02_HELP_TRUCK_01_REW: You really have perfect timing. I couldn't start the car, and it's freezing out there! Thanks a bunch, and here's your fee. As for that painting—I can always try again once I've dealt with my wheels.
US_15_02_HELP_TRUCK_02_DESC: Hey there, traveler! Could you help me tow my truck? It's stuck, and it refuses to start in these freezing temperatures. My destination is a few miles away—or, well, the number's a bit higher if you're counting in clicks. So, give me a lift, eh?
US_15_02_HELP_TRUCK_02_REW: Thanks for the help, really! I should read the itinerary sheet properly next time. It's just, I'm used to the metric system, but they do distance in miles at this company. I miscalculated and ran out of gas... Anyway, here's your pay!
US_15_02_HELP_TRUCK_03_TASK: Snow, Trailer and Two Wood Planks
US_15_02_HELP_TRUCK_03_DESC: Hey there, bud! I've got a trailer stuck not far from here, and it has the tools I need to do some home repairs. We're also short a couple good planks for interior work. Do you think you could deliver the supplies to us?
US_15_02_HELP_TRUCK_03_REW: Thanks, bud! You're a life saver. The tools are all accounted for, and the quality of the planks hasn't suffered. Here's your well-deserved reward! I wouldn't mind hiring you again if there's ever a need.
US_15_02_BLOCKAGE_01_DESC: We're in a bit of bind here. A rockslide has blocked the main road to the ferry station. We need your help getting some metal beams there to clear the way. Don't worry, we'll pay you for the trouble!
US_15_02_BLOCKAGE_01_REW: Good job! Thanks to you, the road is once more operational, which means people can use the ferry again. Here's your well-deserved reward! Please accept it on behalf of our team.
US_15_02_BLOCKAGE_02_DESC: Greetings from the local timbermen! As you might've noticed, a pile of rubble is blocking the logging camp's access road. Our vehicles can't get anywhere like this! We'll need some consumables to clear the way. Could you help with that?
US_15_02_BLOCKAGE_02_REW: Great job! The rubble's gone and access has been restored thanks to you. Here's your reward—you've definitely earned it. We'll give you a ring if your services are ever needed again!
US_15_02_STUCK_ICE_DESC: Hey! Some help here? I drove my truck out onto the ice to do some fishing, but the weight proved to be a bit too much, so now it's stuck there. Could you tow it to the trailer park for me? I'm good for it, promise.
US_15_02_STUCK_ICE_REW: Thanks a ton! Now I just need to get my truck fixed. Good thing the local mechanic agreed to help with that! Here's your reward, as promised. I couldn't have made it without you!
US_15_02_CHEMISTRY_DESC: Hey there! We've got a bunch of chem waste barrels lying around at the old plant. They need to be moved to the port for processing before we're fined for endangering the environment. Care to help us with some recycling?
US_15_02_CHEMISTRY_REW: The barrels have made it to the recycling facility, which means the environment is safe from pollution, and we're safe from getting fined. Perfect timing! Thanks for all your help. Here's your well-deserved reward!
US_15_02_OLD_RESOURCE_DESC: Hello there! The paragliders have requested a prototype exploration unit be delivered to the northern tower to ensure their safety. It's going to improve cell network coverage, which is crucial in emergencies. Would you mind helping us with this life-saving job?
US_15_02_OLD_RESOURCE_REW: Great! With the radar on, the paragliders' phones have signal even out there, which makes their hobby a bit safer. You were a great help, so here's a little bonus to show our appreciation!
US_15_02_BRICKS_DESC: The plant's been shut down, and we're scrapping it for construction materials. We've got two pallets of bricks that need to be transported to the town warehouse. Feel free to use our plant's trailer—though you'll have to get it from a worker's house by the river.
US_15_02_BRICKS_REW: Great job! The bricks have been delivered to the warehouse, and we even got our trailer back. Thanks for all the help with our plant situation. All efforts should be rewarded!
US_15_02_HELP_TRUCK_04_DESC: Hey there! My buddy borrowed my trailer a while ago, but now his car's in the shop, and he can't bring my stuff back. He's willing to pay for delivery, though. One good deed deserves another, eh. I really need that trailer. Do you think you could fetch it for me? My bud's house isn't far.
US_15_02_HELP_TRUCK_04_REW: What can I say? You've done an outstanding job, especially if we take into account this snowy weather! My trailer's finally home, safe and sound. Thanks for the help! Here you go, the promised reward.
US_15_02_SUPPLY_HELP_DESC: Due to recent weather conditions, our town council has issued essential supply kits to help keep people warm. The problem is, we don't have enough council-owned vehicles to distribute those kits. Our townspeople need your help. Will you take the job?
US_15_02_SUPPLY_HELP_REW: Great job! With the essential supply kits delivered, people have everything they need to survive this coldsnap. You are, quite literally, a life saver. Here's your well-earned reward!
US_15_02_CONTEST_RACING: Keep Your Cool on Thin Ice
US_15_02_CONTEST_RACING_DESC: Hey, anyone else want to join our ice race? The track isn't an easy one, so any slip-up could cost you a trip to the repair shop, once you've fished your car out of the ice, that is. But what's a little property damage for a chance to win the prize money, eh? Sing up today!
US_15_02_CONTEST_RACING_REW: Congratulations! Your performance has earned you the top prize! Not just anyone can achieve such ice-driving mastery, you know. The reward's yours, but remember—safe driving beats fast driving any day!
US_15_02_CONTEST_MOUNTAIN_DESC: Hey, bud! We've been riding this track on our snowmobiles, and I bet you won't be able to outrace us. It's a difficult course with a snowy ravine up ahead. Wanna take the dare and show us what you've got? There's money riding on this!
US_15_02_CONTEST_MOUNTAIN_REW: Great run! You've finished faster than expected and haven't even damaged your ride too much. Traversing a snow-covered ravine on wheels is no mean feat! Here's your prize. Come find us if you ever want to do this again.
US_16_01_SCOUTING_DESC: Hey, we need your help. Our drivers keep getting stuck in mud or wasting time taking detours. We need to know which routes are safe and which ones are a one-way ticket to disaster. Check the roads for us and find the best ones, okay?
US_16_01_SCOUTING_REW: Your work deserves an A+! The drivers now know for sure which spots to avoid. Thanks for your help! We'll definitely contact you if anything else comes up.
US_16_01_RECOVERY_GATE_DESC: Hey there! We have a situation and no way to deal with it on our own. We need to clear the way for our construction equipment—deliver a couple of bags of cement, some sand, and an equipment trailer.
US_16_01_RECOVERY_GATE_REW: Great job! Thanks to your delivery skills, everything is accounted for, and the way is finally clear. Everyone can use the road now, and we couldn't have done it without you. Thanks again!
US_16_01_HELP_DELIVERY_DESC: Time is money, and we're in a bind right now. We've got several important shipments waiting to be delivered. Delays can result in major loss of revenue here. We need an experienced driver we can rely on. You in?
US_16_01_HELP_DELIVERY_REW: Thanks for your help! The cargo has been delivered on time and the clients are happy, which means there's a good chance of new contracts for us. Hoping to work with you again if the need arises. But for now, here's your well-earned reward!
US_16_01_BUILD_BRIDGE_01_DESC: We need to build a bridge traversing the mountains. I know it's a big ask, but our logistical needs cannot be satisfied without it. It goes without saying that the cliffs will only make matters worse, so we have some meticulous planning ahead of us. Here's hoping you can help us out.
US_16_01_BUILD_BRIDGE_01_REW: You've accomplished the impossible! With the bridge finished, transportation isn't a concern anymore. We're beyond grateful for your help. Here's your reward.
US_16_01_LIGHTHOUSE_DESC: We have an emergency. The Lighthouse is out of commission, and the ships are going in blind right now. We've been tasked with delivering repair supplies, but the deadline is tight. We need someone to deliver all the materials, fast.
US_16_01_LIGHTHOUSE_REW: The Lighthouse is on again, which means the ships are safe out there. Great job! You've saved us a lot of time and possibly several lives. We have your well-earned reward ready.
US_16_01_BUILD_HANGAR_DESC: Hey there! We're getting ready for a big construction project, and delivering supplies for the hangars is part of our contract. We really hope you can help us out. We're on a deadline, so this is urgent!
US_16_01_BUILD_HANGAR_REW: You're right on time, as always! The supplies are all accounted for, so the construction won't be delayed. You've earned your reward, and here it is! Thanks for being so dependable!
US_16_01_TUNNEL_RESTORATION_DESC: One of our most important routes has been jeopardized by an accident in the tunnel. The whole system could end up paralyzed unless we deal with this, and fast. We need your help to restore everything on time and prevent a full-blown disaster.
US_16_01_TUNNEL_RESTORATION_REW: Thank you for your help! With the tunnel restored, our logistics are on track again. Kudos to you for stabilizing our schedule, and here's a little bonus for your trouble.
US_16_01_FACTORY_DELIVERY_DESC: The plant is this close to shutting down because we haven't received the necessary equipment. We need it here yesterday, or all the lines will have to be deactivated. Could you lend us a hand with this emergency?
US_16_01_FACTORY_DELIVERY_REW: Thanks for helping us out! You've managed to deliver the equipment in the nick of time and help us get the plant up and running. We've prepared a reward for you as a token of our gratitude. This means the world to us.
US_16_01_BUILD_HOUSE_DESC: Hey there! We need some help building a new forester's hut. This is a crucial project meant to improve our foresters' working conditions. Could you deliver the supplies for us and help with the construction?
US_16_01_BUILD_HOUSE_REW: Your help has been invaluable! With the new forester's hut, our employees will be able to work in comfort. We're happy to offer this well-earned reward for your contribution.
US_16_01_LOST_DELIVERY_DESC: Hey there! We've run into an issue with a supply run. The trailer got stuck in a river crossing, and the car itself couldn't make it out either. We need the supplies delivered to the mine, stat, to avoid significant revenue loss. Could you help?
US_16_01_LOST_DELIVERY_REW: You've saved us from some major trouble. Your efficiency and professionalism allowed us to deliver the cargo on time and avoid losses. We have your reward right here to thank you for your help!
US_16_01_WOODEN_BATCH_DESC: Hello! We've prepared a shipment of wood to be delivered to the port, but unfortunately, we have neither the equipment nor the manpower for the job. Could you help us deliver the goods? We'd be much obliged!
US_16_01_WOODEN_BATCH_REW: You're a lifesaver! Thanks to your help, the wood shipment was delivered on time, and that's important in our books. A delay could've really snowballed down the line. We appreciate you chipping in and have your reward right here!
US_16_01_CITY_DELIVERY_DESC: Hello! We have several important delivery contracts with various towns, but none of our drivers are currently available. You have a reputation as a dependable contractor, so we're willing to hire you for these jobs.
US_16_01_CITY_DELIVERY_REW: Great job! You've once again proven you can be counted on. All the shipments have been delivered on time, so no lost profits for us. Thanks for the help, and here's your reward!
US_16_01_WAREHOUSE_RUIN_DESC: We own a burned-down warehouse that has to be demolished. All the rubble and scrap metal needs to be carted away to a recycling plant. It's a rough job, but we'll make it worth your while if you can do it.
US_16_01_WAREHOUSE_RUIN_REW: Great job! You've made short work of demolishing the warehouse and getting the scrap metal to recycling. A+ for effort, right there! We really appreciate your efficiency and your professionalism. Your reward is ready for you. Thanks for all the help!
US_16_01_WOODS_DESC: Our watchtowers need some crucial supplies. Without them, our ability to control our territory will be severely impaired. This contract includes deliveries to several key facilities. Are you ready for this undertaking?
US_16_01_WOODS_REW: You've been a great help! Thanks to you, all the watchtowers have been supplied with the essentials and can now provide uninterrupted service. We really appreciate your assistance. Your reward is ready for you!
US_16_01_WOODEN_BRIDGE_01_DESC: Greetings! My name's Garrett and I work at the local quarry. We've run into an issue—with the old bridge damaged, logistics have been compromised. That bridge was the only connecting point. We'd appreciate it if you could build us a new one!
US_16_01_WOODEN_BRIDGE_01_REW: You've really helped us out! We've been stumped for ages, so your help restoring the bridge is a real lifesaver. We genuinely appreciate your help, and we have your reward ready.
US_16_01_LITTLE_WATER_DESC: Hey there! We've run out of water at the trailer park, and that really makes our folks' lives difficult. We've found a trailer full of water and other supplies, but delivering it is an issue as well. Could you help us out? I don't know what we're going to do without water!
US_16_01_LITTLE_WATER_REW: You completed the job and helped us in our hour of need. The people in the trailer park can now get back to their lives. Thanks a ton! Your well-earned reward is waiting for you!
US_16_01_DELIVERY_HELP_DESC: Hiya! We've got a small problem at the holiday camp. The shipment of planks we're expecting is late, and we really need it for repair work. We'd appreciate it if you could help get the planks to us!
US_16_01_DELIVERY_HELP_REW: Not only did you save us some major trouble, you were quick and efficient about it. Thanks a lot for your help! Your reward is ready and waiting for you, you earned it!
US_16_01_DELIVERY_WOOD_DESC: Hey there! I live alone in the forest, and I need fuel to last me through the winter. My house is quite isolated, so getting deliveries out here is a bit of a challenge. I won't be able to keep working without the fuel. Could you help me out?
US_16_01_DELIVERY_WOOD_REW: I don't know what I would've done without you. With the fuel delivered, I'm all set for the winter. You're a true lifesaver! Thanks for the help.
US_16_01_FISHERS_ORDER_DESC: Hello! We've run into a minor issue with our boats. They need maintenance, and we don't have the spare parts. The warehouse does, but we can't fetch them on our own. Could you do a delivery run for us?
US_16_01_FISHERS_ORDER_REW: Thanks for doing us a solid! Those boats would've remained beached if it weren't for you. We appreciate your timely assistance. All the ordered parts arrived safely, and we have you to thank for that! Go on, help yourself to your reward.
US_16_01_DELIVERY_ISLAND_DESC: People rarely visit this island. Truth be told, I can barely remember what it's like, seeing strangers. The soil here is depleted, but they can't get my fertilizer order to me because this place is so hard to reach. Could you help me with that?
US_16_01_DELIVERY_ISLAND_REW: I barely get any visitors here. You're not just my savior, you're the only person who dared to set foot in this middle-of-nowhere place. Your kindness makes me think there's still hope for me. Please take this as a token of my gratitude.
US_16_01_DELIVERY_TRAILER_01_DESC: Hey! We need you to get a trailer from the mine to the port for us. What's inside? That's for us to know and for you to find out. We need the trailer safe and sound, so be careful on the way. Just get it to the port, and everything will be A-okay!
US_16_01_DELIVERY_TRAILER_01_REW: Thanks for the timely delivery! Don't worry, there's nothing dangerous about the cargo. The mine worker just wanted to play a little prank by keeping it a secret. You handled this perfectly, so thanks!
US_16_01_DELIVERY_TRAILER_02_DESC: Hey, so I got myself into a spot of trouble. My vehicle refused to cooperate on the way down, so I had to ditch the trailer. Do you think you can retrieve it and get it to the container warehouse?
US_16_01_DELIVERY_TRAILER_02_REW: I can't thank you enough! You saved me when my car let me down. Thanks to you, the trailer is now at the warehouse, and I don't have to worry about it. You've helped me finish my work on time—I really appreciate that!
US_16_01_DELIVERY_TRUCK_01_DESC: Hey there! We've run into a bit of trouble. One of our drivers took a wrong turn trying to get around a collapsed bridge and ended up in a swamp. The truck wasn't damaged, but it's stuck there. We need it back in the city ASAP. Can you help?
US_16_01_DELIVERY_TRUCK_01_REW: Thanks for the help. The truck is up and running again. I'd say you've earned the right to use it whenever you want. We have complete faith in you.
US_16_01_DELIVERY_TRUCK_02_TASK: Backing Out of a Dead End
US_16_01_DELIVERY_TRUCK_02_DESC: You know, sometimes you just make poor calls. Take me: I decided to take a shortcut through here and ended up stuck. And now I need help to get my car out and take it to the mine. The clock is ticking!
US_16_01_DELIVERY_TRUCK_02_REW: That spot was sure a tricky one, but with your help, we've dealt with the problem and got the car to its destination. The delay was minimized thanks to your efforts. I appreciate your help!
US_16_01_DELIVERY_SCOUT_01_DESC: Hello! I'm kind of in a bind here: I lost control of my car, it turned over, and now I can't make it home. The car needs to be towed. Can I count on your help?
US_16_01_DELIVERY_SCOUT_01_REW: A huge thank you for helping me tow my car! I was stumped until you came by, but you took care of it like it was nothing. Thanks to you, I was able to get my car home. I really appreciate your efforts!
US_16_01_DELIVERY_SCOUT_02_DESC: Ah, I messed up. As you can see, I ran my car into a swamp. The wheels got stuck, and now it won't budge. I gotta admit, I can't get out of this on my own. Could you help me tow my car? My house isn't far.
US_16_01_DELIVERY_SCOUT_02_REW: I really didn't know what I was gonna do. Much obliged for your help. Most people would've outright refused, but you did the job just fine. If you ever need anything, you know where to find me!
US_16_01_SCOUT_TRAILER_01_DESC: Hey there! I had some provisions delivered, but couldn't get them all the way to the watchtower by myself. The road isn't the best, to put it mildly. Could you help me tow the supply trailer to the tower? These supplies will make my job so much more bearable.
US_16_01_SCOUT_TRAILER_01_REW: You know, you really start to value the simplest things when you're keeping watch on the tower by your lonesome. I have fresh food, warm clothes, and even some emergency supplies now. Thanks a lot!
US_16_01_ROCKS_01_DESC: Our residents have been practically cut off from the rest of the world by this landslide. You'd really make our work easier if you could help us out.
US_16_01_ROCKS_01_REW: The people of Washington will be forever grateful to you!
US_16_01_ROCKS_02_DESC: The main traffic artery of our region has been blocked! Please help us clear the obstruction and save the isolated town.
US_16_01_ROCKS_02_REW: The local transport links are now restored. That's a load off our backs, so thank you!
US_16_01_DRIVE_DESC: My neighbors and I used to enjoy fishing and bragging about our catches to each other, but now one of them has gone no-contact! Could you check on him, see if he's okay? He's old and he lives alone.
US_16_01_DRIVE_REW: I'm A-okay, but thanks for checking up on me. Tell everyone I said hi!
US_16_01_EXPLORE_DESC: As a former racer, I'm always on the lookout for challenging courses. But I like them when they're right next to my humble abode... Could you check out this course for me? Show 'em how it's done!
US_16_01_EXPLORE_REW: Rocks, ravines, grass, and more ravines. Nice, isn't it?
US_16_02_RAILWAY_BRIDGE_01_CONTRACT: The Start of a Long Journey
US_16_02_RAILWAY_BRIDGE_01_DESC: The railway bridge is a key link in our logistics chain, but it has suffered damage and we have no tools to clear the rubble. We need equipment ASAP! Do you think you can deliver a trailer with some spare parts to us? The sooner we get started, the sooner we can restore this route.
US_16_02_RAILWAY_BRIDGE_01_REW: Finally, something has gone our way! We would've been stumped without the spare parts and the trailer. Thanks for your help! It's moments like this that make you realize how rare truly dependable people are. Here, take this. You've earned it.
US_16_02_RAILWAY_BRIDGE_02_CONTRACT: The End of a Long Journey
US_16_02_RAILWAY_BRIDGE_02_DESC: Clearing the rubble was just step 1. Now we need to get some containers and deliver the rubbish to a recycling plant. Once the area is all cleaned up, we'll be able to get the materials for the new bridge here. We'd better get this done fast to restore our logistics!
US_16_02_RAILWAY_BRIDGE_02_REW: Now that was a job and a half! But you did it, and now we can proceed with the next step. This project could've taken months without your help. Thanks a bunch! We've already transferred your well-earned reward to you.
US_16_02_RESTORATION_SAWMILL_DESC: This place once bustled with humming saws, the smell of wood, and dozens of trucks coming and going. The sawmill is still in operation, but the equipment's outdated. We want to give it a face-lift. If you've got the time, we'd be much obliged for your help!
US_16_02_RESTORATION_SAWMILL_REW: Hear that? That's the sound of machinery coming to life! You've given a fresh start to this old sawmill and its workers. This project would've taken us much, much longer if it weren't for you. Thanks, friend! Your reward's waiting.
US_16_02_WINTER_SUPPLIES_DESC: Winter can be unpredictable, so it's best to prepare in advance. We need to stockpile a bunch of supplies so we're ready for whatever comes. Here's a list—these things will help us get through the cold season without too much trouble.
US_16_02_WINTER_SUPPLIES_REW: You've been a huge help! Thanks to you, all our stashes are full, and we can keep working without worrying about resources. We appreciate your efforts, so the reward is already waiting for you.
US_16_02_SCOUT_CARE_DESC: We need various supplies delivered to the scout camp. The living quarters need planks and logs, and the riverside building needs containers and various consumables. The terrain isn't difficult, but this job requires precision. Are you up for it?
US_16_02_SCOUT_CARE_REW: Thanks a bunch! The scout camp is well-supplied thanks to you. That means a lot while we're getting ready for winter. We really appreciate all your work—your reward is already waiting!
US_16_02_RAILWAY_ACCIDENTS_DESC: Railroad trouble always means loss of revenue, and at this point it's reached exorbitant proportions. We need to replace the worn-out parts of the tracks ASAP, or nothing will get delivered at all. If you have the time, we'd really appreciate your help.
US_16_02_RAILWAY_ACCIDENTS_REW: You've done us a solid! The railroad is the heart of logistics, and you've helped us get it back in business. Working with you is always a pleasure. We have your reward right here.
US_16_02_WILDERNESS_DESC: Hey there! We've had lots of heavy rains recently, so the forest routes need to be checked for damage. I usually ask Jerry, but he's busy with something important, again. Could you drive around the area and inspect the routes?
US_16_02_WILDERNESS_REW: Thanks for checking the routes! Some roads are the worse for wear, but at least now we know where the tricky spots are. We'll need to deal with them sometime soon. We value your help—here's your reward!
US_16_02_WATER_PIPES_DESC: We have a bit of a problem. Our water-pumping system is out of commission, which means we'll be in trouble if a fire breaks out. We urgently need supplies to fix the system. Could you help?
US_16_02_WATER_PIPES_REW: Thank you so much! With your help, our water-pumping system has been repaired and is now locked and loaded for any emergencies. We can't thank you enough for your help in this critical moment!
US_16_02_HELPING_FOREST_SERVICE_DESC: We've seen time and again that you're a reliable person. Right now, we need supplies delivered to the Forest Service base. Winter is coming—we need everything ready before it arrives.
US_16_02_HELPING_FOREST_SERVICE_REW: On behalf of the whole Forest Service, we thank you for being so reliable. You've come to our help once again by delivering the supplies on time, so now we're all set for winter. The reward for your efforts is already waiting—make sure to check it out.
US_16_02_BUOY_BUOY_DESC: There was an incident during our data buoy delivery: the trailer got overturned and water carried the cargo away. We won't be able to find it without special equipment, and a hands-on search would take too much time. Could you help us get the buoys back?
US_16_02_BUOY_BUOY_REW: You're a real pro! Thanks to your moxie, we were able to find all the buoys and can now keep monitoring the water conditions. Your reward is waiting for you!
US_16_02_YEAR_AHEAD_DESC: Winter is almost here, and we're running out of logs. We need to restock our warehouses ASAP to make sure there's enough fuel and construction materials for all our facilities. Could you get us a shipment of logs, please?
US_16_02_YEAR_AHEAD_REW: You're a life-saver! We'd hardly be able to do our jobs right without any logs, but the shortage is no longer an issue. Come by again! We'll always have work for a good driver.
US_16_02_WINTER_UPDATE_DESC: Hello! We need you to deliver a water boiler to the hotel cluster. Both the route and the cargo are tricky, but you always come out on top of tasks like this. Could you help? We know we can trust you.
US_16_02_WINTER_UPDATE_REW: Great job! You really helped us out there. With the boiler delivered, the scout camp has all the hot water they need. Your help has been invaluable, so we've prepared a reward to match. Thanks for being such a champ!
US_16_02_GIANT_NEED_DESC: Hello! The hotel cluster has put in a big order of supplies they need to build a water tower. You have a knack for dealing with jobs like this with speed and quality, so we're counting on you!
US_16_02_GIANT_NEED_REW: That was a very important order, so we're glad you took the job. We know that with a pro like you we don't have to worry about the outcome. Thanks for all the help, your reward is on the way!
US_16_02_BRIDGE_REPAIR_DESC: This bridge has been dismantled due to some design errors, and now our logistics are a bust. We need construction materials to rebuild. If you get us everything we need, we'll be able to finish the job fast and restore normal communications!
US_16_02_BRIDGE_REPAIR_REW: Thanks a lot! You've helped us rebuild the bridge and reinstate normal traffic links. This will really make everyone's jobs easier and save people a lot of time!
US_16_02_WOOD_BLOCK_DESC: Yeah... The review is done, and the news isn't good... We've got washed-out roads, landslides, rockslides... First things first, we should deal with the fallen trees since they're blocking important traffic. And no word from Jerry, again. Will you help?
US_16_02_WOOD_BLOCK_REW: Great! Getting to important places should be much easier now!
US_16_02_ENERGY_DELIVERY_DESC: I've got a job for you. One of the key trading depots keeps experiencing blackouts. We've ordered some new power transformers but can't get them to the destination... You could say we're like a plumber whose house has a leak. Could you help us?
US_16_02_ENERGY_DELIVERY_REW: Wow, that's great news! Thanks, and here's your reward!
US_16_02_SCOOTS_PAPER_DESC: The car's here, but we seem to be missing the paper we ordered. We need it at the scout camps for an important art project. The scouts are counting on this delivery. We'd be so grateful if you could help!
US_16_02_SCOOTS_PAPER_REW: You've done well! The kids at the camp are very grateful, and we're sure this couldn't have been done without you. Thanks for your fast and professional work!
US_16_02_BROKEN_GATE_DESC: This gate welcomed rangers for generations, but now it's all but a tilting pile of logs. The park seems soulless like this. We need supplies to restore the park entrance. Let's give this place a fresh start!
US_16_02_BROKEN_GATE_REW: The park entrance finally looks like something to write home about again! Dozens of rangers walked through this gate, and thanks to you, the tradition won't die. Thank you for all your help! Your reward is waiting.
US_16_02_SHARP_TURN_DESC: I was surveying the area when I lost control of the car and it went careening away. Not sure if it was the bumpy road or my own fault, but I can't get the car out on my own. I'd be much obliged if you help me out!
US_16_02_SHARP_TURN_REW: This has to be the worst day of my life... I couldn't have made it out without you. Thanks for not ditching me here! Now to explain to my boss why the car looks like a bear chased it through the forest...
US_16_02_CROOKED_PIT_DESC: Hey buddy! I got myself into a hot mess here. I thought I could get through, somehow, but the mud said no. Now my trailer's stuck, and they're waiting for this cargo at the railway station. I'd be forever grateful if you could tow it there!
US_16_02_CROOKED_PIT_REW: You've saved both the cargo and my career! I'd have definitely caught hell if this cargo didn't arrive on time. Huge thanks for your help! Now I know who to call when I'm in a tough spot.
US_16_02_BAD_CURIOSITY_DESC: So I thought I'd check out a new route. I drive here often but figured this way might be shorter. Well, it wasn't, because now my car's stuck here as part of the landscape. If you have a powerful tow truck, could you help me get back to base?
US_16_02_BAD_CURIOSITY_REW: You came through for me when I was at the end of my rope. You can have the truck. If not for you, it'd still be stuck in the mud.
US_16_02_POTEST_TAMEN_DESC: Hey, you didn't happen to drive past an old village at the marsh, did you? I noticed an abandoned logging trailer there, and it looks like it could still be put to good use. Could you pick it up and bring it to the sawmill?
US_16_02_POTEST_TAMEN_REW: Awesome! The trailer is in perfect condition—we can put it to work at the sawmill right away. By the way, you're free to use it too if the need ever arises. Thanks a bunch!
US_16_02_BEAUTIFUL_STONES_DESC: We're in a spot of trouble here. We ordered some slatestone from Kazakhstan, but the shipping company has refused to deliver it all the way to us. The cargo is waiting at a railway station. Could you pick it up and bring it here?
US_16_02_BEAUTIFUL_STONES_REW: Great job! You've saved the day and helped us finish an important project. Thanks to your help, we can get on with our work now. We have your well-earned reward here.
US_16_02_FERTILIZERS_SUPPLY_DESC: Ah, hello! I've invented a marvelous fertilizer! If everything goes according to plan, my garden will be full of wonders soon! But running deliveries is a job for peons. So help me out with that, would you? For science!
US_16_02_FERTILIZERS_SUPPLY_REW: Oh, you can't imagine the degree of my gratefulness! This fertilizer is revolutionary! My garden is about to become a lab for creating new plant species. You've helped me achieve my goal, and I'm not one to disregard other people's contributions. Your reward is waiting!
US_16_02_SCOUT_WATER_DESC: Hey, now that the water reservoir is fine, do you think you could fill our tanks? Just in case a fire starts somewhere...
US_16_02_SCOUT_WATER_REW: Great! It's always a good idea to have a surplus of water!
US_16_02_FUEL_TANK_DESC: Hi! I have a bit of a problem: my fuel tank got stuck in the swamp. I decided to take the main route, but it was a tall order considering the trailer, so here we are. But we're up to our ears in work to deal with the tank ourselves—could you help us get it to the warehouse?
US_16_02_FUEL_TANK_REW: Great job! We appreciate your help, especially considering the difficulty of the task. The tank has been delivered, and the fuel is now ready to be used at the warehouse. Thanks a lot for your efficiency!
US_16_02_FRIENDLY_HELP_DESC: Greetings! This is bad. We're all out of winter reserves, and there's about to be a cold wave. One of our neighbors has agreed to share his supplies, but I can't transport them on my own. Can I count on you?
US_16_02_FRIENDLY_HELP_REW: Thanks for coming forward! I can't tell you how much I needed those provisions. But now, thanks to your help, getting through the winter should be much easier. Much obliged for your kindness!
US_16_02_ROCK_BLOKER_DESC: There are so many landslides and rockslides in the area that we just can't keep up with them... But we're prioritizing the ones on the main roads. Could you help us out if you have the time?
US_16_02_ROCK_BLOKER_REW: Nicely done... Now we have easy access to the river bank!
US_16_02_WATER_MILL_DESC: Our watermill is a bit wonky and in dire need of repairs. All the required supplies should be by the hotel cluster. Could you deliver them to the mill when you have the time?
US_16_02_WATER_MILL_REW: Great, that should be all we need for the repairs.
US_16_02_RIVER_DRIVE_DESC: An experienced kayaker is looking for someone to race, and he doesn't care how you traverse the river... Do you catch my drift?
US_16_02_RIVER_DRIVE_REW: Way to go! He's yelling that it's not fair, but he was the one who said he didn't care... So here's your prize!
US_16_02_TEST_RUNS_DESC: We're testing our cars' cross-country abilities here. It's just the kind of experience you could always use in our area. If you want to test yours too, be our guest. We'll even help you out with repairs if you do better than us!
US_16_02_TEST_RUNS_REW: Well, your experience definitely shows. Here you go. We did promise to help you out with repairs...
US_16_03_MAIN_POINTS_CONTRACT: Through the Eyes of a Scout
US_16_03_MAIN_POINTS_DESC: We have a large territory under our purview, so sometimes things slip through the cracks. We need you to drive by certain spots and check on the infrastructure. Rain might've washed out the roads or wind might've damaged the buildings. Please tell us if you see anything dire.
US_16_03_MAIN_POINTS_REW: You've saved us a lot of time and potentially major trouble. Thanks for keeping us in the loop. With people like you, the Forest Service has an easier time doing its job.
US_16_03_RESTORATING_SLAB_FACTORY_DESC: Our plant produces concrete slabs, but right now we're in serious trouble. Our equipment has malfunctioned, and there's a power outage at the facility. We'd be able to get back to work if you could deliver us all the supplies we need along with a generator.
US_16_03_RESTORATING_SLAB_FACTORY_REW: Thanks for your timely assistance! The power is finally on, and we have working equipment. We should be able to meet the demand with the production re-launched.
US_16_03_HELICOPTER_FUEL_DESC: Hello! The helipad is all out of fuel, and at this rate, our helicopters will end up unable to fly. We need a tank and some oil barrels. Please deliver the order as soon as possible.
US_16_03_HELICOPTER_FUEL_REW: Thanks for your timely help delivering the fuel! Our helicopters are now all set to keep up their good work, so our ops should go according to plan. We appreciate your efficiency and your support.
US_16_03_RESTORATION_LOGGING_BASE_DESC: The technical issues at our logging site are getting in the way of our work. We need you to get us all the necessary spare parts along with a service trailer. That should help us resume operations and get back to logging faster.
US_16_03_RESTORATION_LOGGING_BASE_REW: Thanks for your help! Everything has arrived on time and has already been put to good use. Your efficiency saved us from any delays, letting us get back to work as usual. You're a champ!
US_16_03_DAM_RESTORATION_01_CONTRACT: Groundwork for a Hydro Power Plant
US_16_03_DAM_RESTORATION_01_DESC: We're in the final stages of construction—just a bit more, and the hydro power plant will be finished. But without a tower crane, we won't be able to assemble the last parts. The crane's at the port. We need it delivered to the construction site.
US_16_03_DAM_RESTORATION_01_REW: Thanks for your help transporting this key piece of equipment! You went to great lengths, and now we're one step closer to finishing this project. That means a lot.
US_16_03_DAM_RESTORATION_02_CONTRACT: Preparing the Hydro Plant for Launch
US_16_03_DAM_RESTORATION_02_DESC: The construction work at the hydro power plant is almost finished, but we're still missing some construction materials. We need them delivered to the final stage construction site. Hope you can help with that.
US_16_03_DAM_RESTORATION_02_REW: Thanks a lot! With your help, we now have the necessary supplies and are all set to finish the power plant. We really appreciate your cooperation.
US_16_03_DAM_RESTORATION_03_DESC: We're this close to finishing the power plant! We just need some final materials for the main building. That building is the heart of the plant, so it's crucial to get it ready for all the plant's equipment.
US_16_03_DAM_RESTORATION_03_REW: Huge thanks for helping us finish the power plant's main building! Your contribution sped up the process significantly, which is why we're almost done with construction now. We value your help and we always know that with your support, things will go smoothly.
US_16_03_DAM_RESTORATION_04_DESC: We're done with the power plant, except for one final step: delivering transformers to the transformer station. This is the key to connecting the plant to the grid. Please help us finish the job!
US_16_03_DAM_RESTORATION_04_REW: Thanks a ton for delivering the transformers! Now we can finally launch power production here. This final step was crucial to finishing the project. We really appreciate your help!
US_16_03_BRIDGE_BLOCKAGE_DESC: A mistake made by construction workers has made the bridge across that ravine unusable, but it's the only way to reach the power plant. Work at the plant had to be halted until the bridge gets rebuilt. We need supplies ASAP to speed up the process.
US_16_03_BRIDGE_BLOCKAGE_REW: Thanks to you, the workers will have all the construction materials and equipment they need, which means the power plant will be commissioned on time. We were worried we wouldn't be able to meet the deadline, but it's all fine now. Thanks for your contribution!
US_16_03_VIEWPOINT_RESTORATION_DESC: This place attracts a lot of tourists and locals, but it's bound to fall into disarray without proper maintenance. We need fresh logs to patch up the buildings and a power generator to keep the lights on. Will you help us preserve this landmark?
US_16_03_VIEWPOINT_RESTORATION_REW: Thanks! The lookout point is as good as new now. Tourists and locals should be able to enjoy the scenery safely thanks to the lighting!
US_16_03_BACK_TO_PLACE_DESC: We need help with an important delivery: some car spare parts should be taken to the logistics center, and several trailers currently scattered across the map should be brought back. We're sure you can help us deal with this in no time!
US_16_03_BACK_TO_PLACE_REW: Thanks for your help! We really appreciate it. You're fast and efficient, and we never have to worry about a thing when you're involved. We look forward to working with you again!
US_16_03_ROCK_BLOCKAGE_DESC: Hey there! A rockslide has blocked the road to the concrete plant. We need to clear it ASAP to restore logistics in the area. Could you help us remove the roadblock?
US_16_03_ROCK_BLOCKAGE_REW: Thanks a bunch for your help! The turnoff to the plant is accessible again, so there will be no delayed supply deliveries. We appreciate your efforts!
US_16_03_RESTORATION_POWER_LINES_DESC: One of our transmission towers went down because of a design error. We need supplies to rebuild it. Please help us with the delivery so we can restore the power supply and avoid any more problems.
US_16_03_RESTORATION_POWER_LINES_REW: Thanks for your help in getting the power lines up and running. Hopefully there won't be any more malfunctions to interrupt our work. Your efficiency is a gem!
US_16_03_HELPING_SCIENTISTS_01_DESC: All our weather towers are experiencing issues, but these two have it the worst. They're our priority in repairs, and we need you to deliver some materials to get them up and running again.
US_16_03_HELPING_SCIENTISTS_01_REW: Thanks for delivering the supplies so fast! The weather towers are operating like clockwork again, and we can keep working as usual.
US_16_03_HELPING_SCIENTISTS_02_DESC: Time to deal with the other two weather towers. We're still working on restoring them, and we need supplies to make them operational. Please deliver the supplies as soon as you can.
US_16_03_HELPING_SCIENTISTS_02_REW: Thanks for your help restoring the last two towers! We'll make sure the whole network is stable and keep in touch with the key remote locations.
US_16_03_NEW_TRUCK_DESC: Hey, friend! Our truck got stuck on the side of the road out in the boonies. We need to get it out, and fast. It's gonna stay there forever if you don't help us. Are you up for it?
US_16_03_NEW_TRUCK_REW: Great job! With the truck up and running again, we can resume our work. By the way, you're free to use it too if you ever need it. We conducted a full inspection—it's perfectly fine. You can consider it yours now.
US_16_03_WEATHER_TOWER_SCOUTING_DESC: Hi! We've got an important job for you. Please check all the weather towers and make sure our equipment is in working order. And please don't take too long. We're counting on you!
US_16_03_WEATHER_TOWER_SCOUTING_REW: Huge thanks for checking on the weather tower so efficiently! Now we know that none of our systems are malfunctioning. Your help has been invaluable!
US_16_03_AIRDROP_DESC: Our helicopter had to jettison some important cargo during a crash landing. We know where it dropped, approximately, but the landscape there is tricky. Please help us recover the cargo.
US_16_03_AIRDROP_REW: Thanks for recovering the cargo for us. It really is important, and with your help, it's safely in our possession again. Your contribution has been invaluable!
US_16_03_SHORE_SOIL_DESC: Good afternoon! We're currently researching riverside soil stability. Please use this thumper to perform a comprehensive soil analysis. It will let us determine and prevent potential landslides.
US_16_03_SHORE_SOIL_REW: Thank you for your thorough examinations and precise data. It will be crucial in assessing how stable the soil is and formulating a plan to build proper embankments.
US_16_03_LOGS_FOR_HOUSE_DESC: Hey friend! I'd like to rebuild my cabin, but I need logs for that. Could you help me with the delivery? I'll owe you one. It's not far, but the load is pretty heavy.
US_16_03_LOGS_FOR_HOUSE_REW: Thanks for doing me a solid. I should be able to restore my cabin with the supplies you've provided. The logs are perfect! Thanks for getting them here despite the harsh conditions. You've saved me a lot of time and trouble!
US_16_03_TUBES_FOR_WELL_DESC: Hey, I could use some help here. I'm drilling a water well on my grounds, but the final step requires some pipes and a water pump. I'd be much obliged if you delivered me all that stuff so I could finish the job.
US_16_03_TUBES_FOR_WELL_REW: Thanks for getting me all the required supplies! My house is about to have an autonomous water supply. You've been a huge help.
US_16_03_TRUCK_HELP_01_DESC: Hello, friend! We've got a problem: a construction trailer got stuck in mud on the way to us. We need your help getting it out and towing it to the construction site. The terrain is tricky, but I'm sure you'll be fine!
US_16_03_TRUCK_HELP_01_REW: I'd like to thank you for your help! You've done a fine job, and with the trailer finally here, we can resume our work. A lot was hinging on these supplies!
US_16_03_TRAILER_HELP_01_DESC: Hey friend! I'm in trouble: my scouting trailer got stuck, and I have to deliver it to the lookout point. I can't make it on my own, so if you've got a bit of time, could you pull it out and tow it to the destination?
US_16_03_TRAILER_HELP_01_REW: You know, I really am grateful to you. The trailer got stuck in the worst place imaginable, but I still got to Lookout Point with your help. That's such a relief. Thanks for getting me out of that mess!
US_16_03_TRUCK_HELP_02_DESC: Hey, friend! My car broke down and died halfway to the northeast weather tower. I don't think I'll make it there without your help. Could you get me out and give me a lift?
US_16_03_TRUCK_HELP_02_REW: Thanks a ton! I can see about repairing my car now that you've towed it right to the weather tower. I would've been stuck there for a long time if it weren't for you. You can't even imagine how great of a help you've been. I owe you!
US_16_03_TRAILER_HELP_02_DESC: Hey, buddy! Seems like I underestimated how powerful the currents are when I tried to take the shortcut through the river crossing. Luckily, the trailer got stuck on the rocks, but all my cargo got carried away. Can you help me retrieve the trailer and search the banks for my lost goods?
US_16_03_TRAILER_HELP_02_REW: Oh man, this is a serious stroke of luck! Both with the cargo not sinking and the trailer getting stuck. But most importantly, with you coming to my aid like I hoped someone would! There really are people with hearts of gold!
US_16_03_WATER_PUMP_DESC: We're having some trouble with an uncertified pump. It was delivered to the helipad, and now we need to perform several tests and get it certified before it will be ready for use.
US_16_03_WATER_PUMP_REW: Nicely done! All the certification steps have been completed successfully and the pump is ready to be installed. Our work can finally go on thanks to you! Huge thanks for your help.
US_16_03_CONCRETE_DELIVERY_DESC: Here's the deal: a trailer carrying concrete blocks got stuck on the way to the northwest weather station. It won't budge, and the blocks need to be delivered to several clients. Could you help me out and then bring the trailer back to the precast concrete plant?
US_16_03_CONCRETE_DELIVERY_REW: You're a life-saver! We've managed to meet the deadlines thanks to you. Here's your reward—it's the least I can offer you for such an outstanding job. Thanks again for the help!
US_16_03_TREE_BLOCKAGE_DESC: Oh no! One of the trees fell right on the road, and just when the loggers finally took a lunch break, too. No time to wait for their break to end, we need your help now! Could you get us a tool trailer?
US_16_03_TREE_BLOCKAGE_REW: Well done! These are nice logs, since the logging area has some quality trees. It's a good thing we managed to saw apart the tree before it started decaying. Here's a little something for your efforts!
US_16_03_FISHING_FARM_DESC: Ah, good thing you happened by! Could you drive to the fish farm to the east of here and bring us the special pool cleaning equipment, as well as a couple of barrels of cleaning solution? The people there will be expecting you.
US_16_03_FISHING_FARM_REW: Great job! We need to get the old incubator tanks cleaned up before breeding a new batch of fish. The filters have become pretty crummy by now. Thanks for the service, and here's your reward!
US_16_03_SCOUT_CAMP_DESC: Hey there, traveler! We're trying to see who knows the trails around this mountain the best. The winner will be crowned The Mountain Trail Conqueror! Anyone is welcome to enter. Want to give it a shot?
US_16_03_SCOUT_CAMP_REW: Now that's a fine showing! Much better than most of the other contestants, in fact. You probably know some shortcuts—which is totally fine, because he who knows the track best wins. Here's your prize!
US_16_03_LOGGING_BASE_DESC: We have our hands full with logging, but the higher-ups at the camp are demanding an update on the state of the adjoining roads. Can you drive around real quick, check if there's a fallen tree blocking one of the roads or something?
US_16_03_LOGGING_BASE_REW: Now that's what I call fast! Thanks for saving us a ton of time and trouble. Now that the roads have been checked over, we can safely give our bosses an updated report. Here's your pay!
RU_17_01_SCOUTING_READY_DESC: Hey there! The restoration efforts in the region are in full swing, but we need to make sure all the key facilities are operating properly. Please drive to the warehouse, the factories, and the train terminal to gather data for our progress report.
RU_17_01_SCOUTING_READY_REW: Great job! Thanks to you, we now have complete data on the region's key facilities. This is very valuable for our planning. We have your reward ready right here.
RU_17_01_FACTORY_BUILD_DESC: Hey there! Our food factory is almost ready, but we could use your help to meet our final deadline. We're really hoping you can deliver all the necessary supplies for us to kick-start production.
RU_17_01_FACTORY_BUILD_REW: Great job! Thanks to you, the factory has everything it needs now, and construction is continuing without delay. We really appreciate your support in our business endeavors. Your reward is ready!
RU_17_01_BUILD_BRIDGE_DESC: Hey friend! The bridge by the garage still isn't ready—supplies got stuck somewhere, and without that connection, not a single truck can get through. It would be a huge help if you took on the delivery! We've just about given up hope waiting around here.
RU_17_01_BUILD_BRIDGE_REW: This is a big deal! Now that the bridge is ready, we finally have a proper passage again. Everyone is happy as a clam, especially the mechanics, since they won't have to crawl through the ravine anymore. Thank you on behalf of our whole team—you've earned this reward!
RU_17_01_FOOD_WAREHOUSE_DESC: Hey, we've got a bit of an emergency here. The central warehouse is almost empty, and without new supplies, everything's going to grind to a halt. We need building supplies and a couple of freezers delivered to get things moving again. Think you can handle it?
RU_17_01_FOOD_WAREHOUSE_REW: Perfect, that's exactly what we needed! Thanks to you, the warehouse is back in business—the produce won't spoil now, and the equipment is running like clockwork. The whole team appreciates your punctuality and reliability. Your reward is ready—you've definitely earned it!
RU_17_01_DELIVERY_FOODS_DESC: Hey, could you do us a favor? We need a few containers and some refrigeration units delivered—one to the city warehouse, the other to the retreat. It's nothing complicated, just get them to their destinations. You're the most reliable driver we've got.
RU_17_01_DELIVERY_FOODS_REW: You're the only one who can handle shipments like this—quickly, carefully, and without any fuss. Both locations have everything they need now. Thanks for the help, pal! Your reward is waiting for you.
RU_17_01_DELIVERY_WAREHOUSE_DESC: Things seem to be falling apart here when you're not around. The sand for the east farm still hasn't been delivered, and the logs are waiting for transport to the west. You'll have to drive around a bit, but be careful—the road's no walk in the park. You in?
RU_17_01_DELIVERY_WAREHOUSE_REW: Right on schedule, and no breakdowns, as usual! Thanks to you, both the eastern and western farms can get back to business. You've earned the reward fair and square, so come get it as soon as you can.
RU_17_01_SEISMO_CHECK_DESC: Hello! Our management is collecting data on mountain slope soil. We need you to drive to four seismic zones and take measurements. It will help with planning future projects in the area.
RU_17_01_SEISMO_CHECK_REW: Well done! The measurements have been taken correctly, so our engineers can now plan their work accurately. A well-deserved reward for your help is waiting for you.
RU_17_01_DRILL_WATER_01_DESC: Hey there! Our water extraction project is about to begin, but without the drilling trailer, we're dead in the water. We need you to deliver it to the site—the sooner it gets there, the sooner we can start drilling. Can you handle it?
RU_17_01_DRILL_WATER_01_REW: Great job! The drilling trailer has arrived right on time, so now we can start with the water extraction. The project would definitely be behind schedule without your help. You really came through for us, so here's your reward.
RU_17_01_DRILL_WATER_02_DESC: You've helped us out before, and now we're in a similar spot. The second site is ready for drilling, but the trailer still hasn't arrived. The crew is waiting, our equipment stands idle. You're our only hope—please get it over there.
RU_17_01_DRILL_WATER_02_REW: Thank you! With the trailer on site, our crew has already started drilling. The operation would've been stalled for another week without you! You've proven once again that we can count on you—great job!
RU_17_01_WATER_TOWERS_DESC: All right, time to move on to the next step. We've got the water, but now we need to distribute it! We have to build two water towers—one for the eastern fields and another for the western ones. If you can help us deliver the supplies, we'll get through the season without any drought for sure.
RU_17_01_WATER_TOWERS_REW: Outstanding work! Both towers are up and running, providing people with a steady, reliable flow of water. Our fields are now well-protected against the drought. Thank you, you've come through for the entire region once again!
RU_17_01_DELIVERY_LOGS_DESC: Those last rains really did a number on our farms—some areas have been washed out and need repairs. We need you to haul some logs to rebuild the warehouses and outbuildings. You've always got a reliable rig ready to go!
RU_17_01_DELIVERY_LOGS_REW: All the materials are on site, and the farmers have already gotten to work. Thanks to you, we won't fall behind and can finish the season without a hitch. Great job, here's your reward!
RU_17_01_FIELDS_FERTILIZER_DESC: The central farm is in a real bind—the fertilizer and trailer are delayed, and all the equipment's just sitting idle. We needed someone reliable, and you were the first person we thought of. Can you get it all delivered on time? We're counting on you!
RU_17_01_FIELDS_FERTILIZER_REW: Thank you! The fertilizer and trailer have arrived right on time, and now the work is back on schedule. You didn't just help—you saved the farmers from a ruined season. Your well-earned reward's waiting.
RU_17_01_TUNNEL_CONTRACT: Light at the End of the Tunnel
RU_17_01_TUNNEL_DESC: Good afternoon! There's been a collapse in the railway tunnel, and all traffic is completely stopped now. We need materials for the cleanup and reinforcing the structure. Without it, all transport will grind to a halt. Can you deliver everything we need?
RU_17_01_TUNNEL_REW: Great job! The debris has been cleared, the materials delivered, and the tunnel is ready for trains again. Thanks to you, traffic is back up and running. Your reward's been processed—you've earned it, one-hundred percent.
RU_17_01_ROAD_TROUBLE_DESC: Hey there! The tower by the road collapsed after the last storm—there are piles of stone left that we can use to rebuild the temple. Please get us some empty containers, load up the usable blocks, and deliver them to the construction site.
RU_17_01_ROAD_TROUBLE_REW: You handled that perfectly! All the containers have been delivered and the materials are on site. The temple's restoration is underway! We have your well-earned reward right here.
RU_17_01_OPEN_GATE_DESC: Hey pal! We've got to get the mountain route back in shape: a stretch of the road has been damaged, and we need the repair supplies hauled right to the spot. Until it's fixed, the way to the other side of the region is blocked, and the crew's stuck waiting.
RU_17_01_OPEN_GATE_REW: Great job! With the materials delivered, the road section has been repaired, and traffic's moving freely again. The repair team and all the locals are really grateful to you. We have your reward ready.
RU_17_01_OIL_COMPANY_DESC: The construction of our new boiler facility is in full swing, but the shipments are running late. We'll have to shut down production without those missing materials. If you can handle the delivery, you'll be saving the entire project.
RU_17_01_OIL_COMPANY_REW: You really came through for us! The boiler facility is up and running, production is humming along, and people are smiling again. We've put together a nice reward for you—nothing less than you deserve. Thanks, pal!
RU_17_01_FARM_SOLAR_CONTRACT_DESC: Hey bud! The farm's buzzing with activity, and some of the greenhouses are already up, but we still need to install the solar panels and finish the rest of the buildings. If you can help with the delivery and construction, the farm will be running at full capacity again in no time!
RU_17_01_FARM_SOLAR_CONTRACT_REW: Great job! The solar panels are in place, the unfinished greenhouses have been completed, and the farm is ready for harvest season again. You've done a lot of good work, so your reward is already waiting for you.
RU_17_01_CONTAINER_DELIVERY_DESC: Hey there! We could use your help: these equipment containers are needed at the sawmill and the old farm. It's a crucial delivery for our operations—without it, everything has grinded to a halt.
RU_17_01_CONTAINER_DELIVERY_REW: Thanks for the help! All the containers have arrived and the equipment's being put to good use. We're glad we can count on you. Here's your well-deserved reward.
RU_17_01_FIELD_WORK_DESC: Hey! Our plants survived the drought, the water's back on, but it's not enough—the seedlings are still weak. We urgently need fertilizer to revive them and get the farm's harvest back on track. Can you help us get the supplies before it's too late?
RU_17_01_FIELD_WORK_REW: Thank you for your help! Thanks to your fertilizer delivery, the plants are coming back to life and the farm is almost back to normal. We've prepared a well-earned reward for your hard work—you're free to use it however you see fit.
RU_17_01_FIELD_CLEAR_DESC: Hey! The old field's overgrown with spruce trees, and the rocks are choking out the new sprouts. We need your help: please bring in the supplies, clear the land, and help us reclaim the field so it can bear fruit again!
RU_17_01_FIELD_CLEAR__REW: Thank you! With your help, the old field's come back to life, and the grapes are growing again—the harvest is saved. Your well-deserved reward is ready.
RU_17_01_HOLLYWOOD_DESC: Hey, we need your help! The movie set is almost ready, but not all the materials for the props and set dressings have arrived on time. We need you to deliver them so we can continue shooting without delays and get the movie finished on schedule.
RU_17_01_HOLLYWOOD_REW: We're much obliged! Thanks to your help, the set dressings and props arrived on time, and the shoot is going according to plan. Your reward is ready—it's fully deserved for this contribution.
RU_17_01_TRUCK_DELIVERY_01_TASK: The Long Way Through a Shortcut
RU_17_01_TRUCK_DELIVERY_01_DESC: Ah, I'm in a real bind... The bridge was a no-go, so I tried to cut through the swamp, and now my car's stuck up to its axles. If you can, please tow it to my workplace—there's no way I'm getting out of here on my own.
RU_17_01_TRUCK_DELIVERY_01_REW: You're a real life-saver! The car's in one piece, I made it to my job, and it looks like I'll be stuck here for a while. So, if you ever need any equipment, feel free to use mine. The reward is rightfully yours—thanks from the bottom of my heart!
RU_17_01_TRUCK_DELIVERY_02_DESC: What a day! I just finished a shooting session and thought I'd take a shortcut across the water to protect my suspension. Well, that didn't pan out since the car's now stuck in a swamp up to its headlights. I'd appreciate a tow before it starts sprouting moss.
RU_17_01_TRUCK_DELIVERY_02_REW: Hah, now I get why they say, “Don't play hero off-camera!” No, really, thanks—without that tow, I'd be shooting the movie's finale in a swamp.
RU_17_01_TRAILER_DELIVERY_01_DESC: Listen, we've got a bit of a situation here... One guy sold a trailer to the farm but couldn't deliver it—got it buried deep in the swamp. Feel like earning a bit of cash? We need it pulled out and delivered to the address before it sinks for good.
RU_17_01_TRAILER_DELIVERY_01_REW: Well, everything's been squared away—the trailer's on site, the farm's happy, and the swamp got the bird again. Thanks, you really came through for us!
RU_17_01_SCOUT_DELIVERY_01_DESC: Well, I tried to save a couple of minutes and ended up losing several hours... I was driving back from my friend's farm, thought I could dash through a puddle, and now I'm stuck. Can you help tow me back home?
RU_17_01_SCOUT_DELIVERY_01_REW: Now that's what I call a real helping hand! At least now I've got someone to laugh with about my “brilliant” idea. Thanks, pal, I definitely wouldn't have gotten out without you.
RU_17_01_SCOUT_DELIVERY_02_DESC: Hello. I was doing some geological exploration for the future construction of a water tower—had to get a couple soil samples. Unfortunately, my vehicle was pulled downhill on a turn and now it's stuck. Could you help pull it out?
RU_17_01_SCOUT_DELIVERY_02_REW: Great job! Everything has gone smoothly. The equipment is intact, and thanks to you, we can get on with the construction without any delays. Our management sends its regards along with your well-earned reward.
RU_17_01_SCOUT_TRAILER_01_DESC: Ah, someone's abandoned their equipment at the foot of the hill again. The scouting trailer seems to be in one piece, just stuck and left. Can you tow it to the parking lot by the garage?
RU_17_01_SCOUT_TRAILER_01_REW: And that's that, the trailer's back home. Thanks, friend, you're always right on time. Without you, we'd have had to call in a whole crew. Your reward's been finalized—you've earned it.
RU_17_01_MAGAZINES_DELIVERY_DESC: Hey! I run a few small shops around here, and my storerooms are short on merchandise. I'd be really grateful if you could check this list and deliver what's needed. I just don't have the time to do it myself, and the roads aren't exactly in great shape right now.
RU_17_01_MAGAZINES_DELIVERY_REW: Got everything, right on cue! Thank you so much. Stocked shelves make for happy customers, and without you, I'd have had to close up for a week. The reward is yours—you've earned it fair and square.
RU_17_01_ROCK_TOWNS_DESC: Management is asking for help in supplying several remote villages. The roads are in rough shape, but people live there year-round and depend on regular deliveries. We're counting on you.
RU_17_01_ROCK_TOWNS_REW: Thank you for being so diligent. All the villages have received their shipments, and thanks to you, we've avoided any supply disruptions. You've proven that we can always rely on you. Your reward has been issued.
RU_17_01_WATCHTOWERS_HELP_DESC: Good afternoon! Our people at the watchtowers are running low on supplies, and it'll be tough for them to work without a restock. Can you help deliver everything they need?
RU_17_01_WATCHTOWERS_HELP_REW: Great job! Everything needed has been delivered to the towers, so our men are all set and back in action. Thanks for your reliability—we'd have been in a tight spot without you. Your reward has been transferred.
RU_17_01_HOUSE_ALONE_DESC: Listen, we have some leftover supplies at the construction site, and we decided to donate them to the warden nearby. Can you help transport them before someone steals everything?
RU_17_01_HOUSE_ALONE_REW: Well done on the fast delivery! They've already started unloading the supplies—apparently, they could really use the stuff right now. Thanks for helping out!
RU_17_01_FARM_HELP_DESC: Hey pal! I've got a farm here, and these waste containers are just getting in the way of everything. Can't manage it alone—I need your help collecting them, loading them up, and hauling them far away. I'd be much obliged!
RU_17_01_FARM_HELP_REW: Perfect, everything's been hauled off! The farm's a bit cleaner now, so we can get back to work without stumbling over trash. Thanks for your help—you fully deserve this reward!
RU_17_01_HOUSE_ON_THE_ROCK_DESC: Heya! My cliffside house is built in a very scenic spot, but it's nearly impossible to get supplies up here on my own. Can you help me deliver the cargo? I'd be really grateful!
RU_17_01_HOUSE_ON_THE_ROCK_REW: Excellent! The supplies are all accounted for, so I can finally get on with my work. Thanks for helping me out—this reward is well and truly earned!
RU_17_01_METAL_CITY_DESC: Hey there! We're running low on metal at the pipe warehouse, and without it, production will grind to a halt. We're doing whatever we can with the shortage, but there's just no way around it. Could you get us some supplies? It would be a huge help!
RU_17_01_METAL_CITY_REW: Great work! With your help, we've restocked and can now resume assembly. Everyone's grateful—without you, the day would've ended in a shutdown. Here's your well-deserved reward!
RU_17_01_OIL_DELIVERY_DESC: Hey! There's been an accident on the tracks leading to our oil refinery, and the trains aren't running. We desperately need some fuel containers to keep the plant running. Can you help and deliver them yourself?
RU_17_01_OIL_DELIVERY_REW: Excellent! We've received the containers. Despite the issues with the tracks, the plant is running again. Thanks for your quick work—the reward is yours!
RU_17_01_CITY_VIEW_DESC: Hey! My car broke down just outside the city, but the orders still need to be dealt with. Could you deliver the cargo for me? I'm really stuck here without your help!
RU_17_01_CITY_VIEW_REW: You're something else! The orders are delivered, the farmer's happy, and all is well in the world again. Please enjoy your reward for the skillful help!
RU_17_01_CROSS_HOUSE_DESC: Hey, I need a hand here! The fuel storage is almost empty, and the garage is asking for an urgent freezer delivery. Without it, all work will come to a halt. Hope you've got time to help out.
RU_17_01_CROSS_HOUSE_REW: Honestly, we wouldn't have managed without you. But now we have the fuel, and the storage is in perfect order. Thanks from the whole team—this reward is well deserved!
RU_17_01_RAILWAY_DELIVERY_DESC: Hey, things at the warehouse by the train station have ground to a halt. We've got burst pipes, and the equipment's acting up like an old steam engine. We won't get anywhere without repairs. Could you deliver the pipes and spare parts? You'd be a real lifesaver!
RU_17_01_RAILWAY_DELIVERY_REW: Great work! Since you got us everything in a timely manner, the pipes have already been replaced, and the station is as good as new again. Thank you so much—without your help, we'd have been stuck for a long time.
RU_17_01_GROUP_HOUSE_DESC: Hey! The village is having power outages again—the old panels are worn out, and the equipment's down without spare parts. We've ordered new solar panels and components, but there's no one to deliver them. Can you help the folks out?
RU_17_01_GROUP_HOUSE_REW: Great job! The panels are up, the power's flowing, people are happy. Without you, the issue would've dragged on, but now it's all bright and peaceful again. Thanks, you really saved us!
RU_17_01_FOREST_HOUSE_TASK: The Last Run Before the Cold
RU_17_01_FOREST_HOUSE_DESC: Listen, we've got another shortage—people are out of fuel and hay. We've got everything ready, it just needs to be delivered. The locations are hard to reach, especially that house by the cliff, but I know you can handle it.
RU_17_01_FOREST_HOUSE_REW: People from all three locations asked me to thank you! They say it's been a long time since they've seen anyone make deliveries so quickly and efficiently. We can all rest easy now that everyone has their fuel and hay for the cold season.
RU_17_01_RAILWAY_CHECK_DESC: Here's the thing... we need to check a section of track before we can send a train through. The rules say to do it on foot, but who's got the time? Take a drive down there, see if there's any warping on the rails.
RU_17_01_RAILWAY_CHECK_REW: Look at you go! The management and I are glad that the rails are fine. Means the trains will be up and running on schedule soon! Thanks for the help, we definitely couldn't have managed without you.
RU_17_01_CLIMB_PLATFORM_DESC: Hey! Folks at the rail yard have come up with a challenge—you need to drive across the platforms without falling off or getting stuck. Everyone keeps saying the route's impossible, but I'm sure you can prove them wrong.
RU_17_01_CLIMB_PLATFORM_REW: They definitely owe you money! Nobody believed you could do it. Even the rail yard workers lost the bet. Great job, you're a local legend around the yard now!
RU_17_02_OLD_FACTORY_DESC: This industrial giant once supplied concrete products to the entire district, but now its facilities are empty. Well, we won't stand for it, not on our watch! It's time to restore the plant to its former glory, and your help will be crucial in this endeavor!
RU_17_02_OLD_FACTORY_REW: A lot of the locals have gotten used to the quiet without the industrial noises of this plant. But that noise symbolizes a new dawn for the region. The precast concrete will help restore other facilities, and the plant itself will give people lots of jobs!
RU_17_02_FIRST_SCOUT_DESC: Welcome! This region is known for its vast forests, clean air, and scenic mountainscapes. But tourists are still a rare sight around here. So, while you're at it, why not stop by these places and enjoy the view?
RU_17_02_FIRST_SCOUT_REW: I see you're already done sightseeing! So, how do you like the scenery? It's beautiful, right? Here's a welcome gift from the region. And regarding tourism—we could use some further assistance down the line.
RU_17_02_PLATFORM_RESTORATION_DESC: We have to think about passenger safety first and foremost, and we should start by restoring the old platforms. We need to deliver supplies to the two platforms so the construction crews can finish the restoration before the tourist season begins.
RU_17_02_PLATFORM_RESTORATION_REW: Good job! New arrivals won't have to worry about tripping on the platform or their phone accidentally falling down a gap in the slabs now. Thanks for your help. And here's your payment!
RU_17_02_RAILWAY_ACCIDENT_DESC: Our region isn't called the Valley of Falling Rocks for nothing. Just the other day, a massive rockslide came down right on a passing train. No one was hurt, thankfully, but we need to deal with the aftermath as soon as possible!
RU_17_02_RAILWAY_ACCIDENT_REW: Phew, thanks for the save. The first step's done: the rocks have been cleared, the mangled carriages have been hauled away, and relief efforts have been paid for. Here's your cut, but don't go too far—there's still more work to be done here.
RU_17_02_SMALL_ACCIDENT_DESC: It's always one thing after another. And while this rockslide happened after our trains were cut off, it's still no good that it's blocking the tracks. This one's a quick fix—a couple of planks should do the trick. Can you deliver some?
RU_17_02_SMALL_ACCIDENT_REW: You really helped us out, thank you! It's great to see everyone approaching this with such a strong sense of responsibility. Even the locals are pitching in to help our crew clear the debris. You've earned yourself a special thanks and a reward!
RU_17_02_TRAIN_01_DESC: It's not every day the railway services ask the road transport services for help. But this is an exception. We need to tow an engine from the bridge to the southern platform for refueling. A relief train driver will be waiting there.
RU_17_02_TRAIN_01_REW: Well done! The engine made it safely to its destination, no vehicles were overturned, and I'm glad to see your car's frame is still in one piece. That's a good rig you've got, a powerful one! Here's your reward!
RU_17_02_RAILWAY_RESTORATION_DESC: Now that the rocks are out of the way, all we have to do is fix the rails. It's a good thing our warehouse has pre-assembled sections of track just sitting there. We need you to deliver them to each of the crash sites. That should let us restore railway traffic.
RU_17_02_RAILWAY_RESTORATION_REW: Great! Now, we can count on railway connections with the other regions, which will help us restore the rest of the region's infrastructure and also bolster tourism. You've handled the task perfectly!
RU_17_02_ASPHALT_BLOCKAGE_CONTRACT: A New Life for a Tower
RU_17_02_ASPHALT_BLOCKAGE_DESC: It's a terrible shame that one of the most ancient towers here has collapsed. But every cloud has a silver lining. Pieces of the original masonry will be used to restore our temple. So, when you're clearing the rubble, make sure to separate ordinary stones from the original masonry.
RU_17_02_ASPHALT_BLOCKAGE_REW: The construction crew at the temple has already received further instructions regarding the masonry containers. Meanwhile, the situation on the road has improved, and this section no longer poses a danger to passing vehicles.
